faqs.question: Does AIIMS Bibinagar offer BSc courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, AIIMS Bibinagar does offer BSc courses in several specialsaitions. These specialisations are broadly offered within two fields, Nursing and Paramedical. The minimum eligibility requirement for admission to BSc courses is that applicants must have completed their Class 12 from the PCB stream with English and must have secured at least an aggregate of 55%.

faqs.question: What is the average package for MBBS students at AIIMS Hyderabad?
faqs.answer:
At AIIMS in Hyderabad, an MBBS doctor makes, on average?10.6 Lacs a year. In India, an MBBS doctor makes, on average, between INR 7.3 Lakhs and 14 lakhs.
In India, the average income for an AIIMS MBBS doctor with less than a year of experience to four years is 10.2 lakhs. The salary range for an MBBS doctor at AIIMS India is 8.2 Lakhs to 14.0 Lakhs. Our calculations show that it is 54% higher than the typical MBBS doctor's salary in healthcare organizations.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by AIIMS Hyderabad?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Hyderabad fee is cumulative of various components such as tuition fee, hostel charges, security deposit, library fee, and more. The total fee varies for each of the programme. AIIMS Telangana MBBS fee is INR 3.32 lakh. The mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. Hence, is subject to changes.

college_info.intro: At the UG level, AIIMS Hyderabad offers an MBBS course in a full-time mode. The duration of the UG course is 5.5 years and is further divided into three phases. AIIMS Hyderabad admission to the MBBS course is through NEET-UG. Apart from this, the institute also offers MD, MS, and BSc (H) Nursing programmes. Check out the following course sections for more details around AIIMS Bibinagar popular programmes:

The mode of study for all the AIIMS Hyderabad courses is full-time. Some of the specialisations in which the courses are offered include General Surgery, Pathology, Pharmacology, Orthopaedics, Microbiology, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Best faculty members and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of results are expected for sure. Out of 100 students, 90 get good results and placements. 90% of students get placed and get better opportunities as they pass out from this institute. It is a very great esteemed institution.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have AC and library is available. Also e-library is there. We have a ground for volleyball and other sports available. Badminton court is available. Medical facilities are also there. Mess is good and maintained clean. It is cleaned daily and maintained with hygiene. Wi-Fi is given to everyone in the hostel. Best infrastructure and services are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Great for the reputation and value for money. Infrastructure is still developing further.

review_content.Placements: After completing one year of internship in the college, students take admission for post-graduation (MD/MS). Many students got admissions through INI CET with good ranks. A few took admission in the same college. Others got into good state government colleges. Placements are not provided by the college in the medical field. Instead, students have to give entrance exams like NEET PG or INI CET and enroll for PG courses based on their counselling results.
review_content.Infrastructure: Currently, academics are conducted in the hospital building itself. The classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, ACs, and writing boards. The library is small but contains the required academic textbooks and literature for all courses and subjects. Academics will soon shift to the newly built academic block, which has modern infrastructure and will be equipped with better and more facilities. The hostels have both single-seater and two-seater rooms. Currently, students get double occupancy for the first two years and then a single. Rooms have good furniture, storage space, purified water, and clean washrooms. Every room has a balcony. Overall, it's great.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College life in AIIMS Bibinagar .

review_content.Placements: Yet to be passed out. Salaries depend on the course you take in PG, but the base salary is 60k per month. All colleges have recruitment. Everyone got into internship. DM Radiology is the top course offered. The remaining all depends on the way you work. Salaries increase every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available in college. Hostel rooms are good. Almost all infrastructure is present. Sports activities are less. Food in the mess is bad; need to get food from outside. Food from outside is manageable. Medical facilities are available. The canteen is yet to be opened. Wi-Fi is not available in hostel rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Review of AIIMS-Hyderabad.

review_content.Placements: In medical, the college doesn't provide placements. But the only thing I can say is that if you study MBBS, there would be a lot of opportunities in this world where you can either pursue Masters or work in a generalized hospital and get a respectable salary.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is still under construction. I think it may take nearly a year to complete, so better hostel facilities will be available. Now, we are on a temporary hostel campus near the main campus.
review_content.Faculty: All the central institutes have the best faculty, which can't be seen in other medical colleges. The speciality of our AIIMS is that for every two students, there is one faculty member. We follow the same curriculum as per AIIMS Delhi. We have nearly 3 internals for each subject.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best place to explore students knowledge and get into research. Teachers are approachable.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not applicable for MBBS students. Students will do internships and then get a house surgeon certificate after they become registered medical practitioners. Students can start their clinic or they can crack a PG seat and study further to achieve high standards.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi is available, and also in the boys' hostel, it is in the process for the girls' hostel. Laboratories and classrooms are well established, since it is a new college and it takes time to reach students' expectations. The food is average and there is only one canteen available, and less batches are there. Sports and cultural are excellent and students will enjoy everything.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good, but the stipend offered is low.

review_content.Placements: The total class size is 50 students, which is good. In MBBS, the packages are not classical like in other courses. Once you complete 4 and a half years of studying and a year of internship, you can either opt for higher studies like MD/MS or you can apply for different hospitals in India. If you get into a renowned hospital in a city, then your salary will be higher than doctors in rural areas comparatively.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our annual fest's name is very interesting, Pyrexia. We didn't get a chance to enjoy the annual fest due to Covid 19. Our library has lots of books available. We have our coursebook, fiction, novel, comics, anything and everything. The library should be a little more spacious. The campus has all the games one would want to play. Our rooms are spacious and clean, with a single bed in each room. We can use any electronic machines in our room as the electrical bill is included in the hostel fee. The college has provided us with a good table and chair as well. We have been served really good and tasty food as of in my case, but opinions change. The registration process for hostel allotment is really flawless and simple. Our hostel is super affordable, and we give less than 20 rupees per month as our hostel fee.

overview_faqs.question: What are people's opinions on AIIMS Hyderabad for MBBS?
overview_faqs.answer: Everyone knows that AIIMS colleges are the best Medical Colleges in India. AIIMS Hyderabad is one of the best medical college in India. The students of AIIMS Hyderabad reported that the college is best for education, infrastructure, hostels and many more. According to me the best thing about AIIMS Colleges are the course fees. Compare to other colleges they are highly affordable. Not only study, lots of events and fests are conducted in the college. According to some students of AIIMS Hyderabad the placements and stipend are not good in this college, which is a major drawback. But many students are studying day and night for getting seat in AIIMS Colleges. There must be something special in this college that's why they are studying hard to get entrance in this college. At last I want to say that AIIMS IS THE BEST MEDICAL COLLEGE IN INDIA.

overview_faqs.question: What is the other fee components of MBBS course AIIMS Hyderabad?
overview_faqs.answer: There are different fee components of the MBBS course at AIIMS Hyderabad apart from the tuition fee. The fee components are required to be paid semesterly, annually, or one time. The hostel fee for MBBS students at AIIMS Bibinagar is INR 3.56 lakh. The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change. Therefore, it is indicative.

admission_overview.college_name: AIIMS Bibinagar Course Admissions 2025: NEET UG, Cutoff, Process, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bibinagar,offers a full-time MBBS programme at the undergraduate level. It also offers two postgraduate courses, namely MD and MS. AIIMS Telangana admission is entrance-based. AIIMS Telangana is one of the six newly established AIIMS under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare in 2019. The institute occupies the Bibinagar campus of Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS) as of now.

Before applying for AIIMS Bibinagar admission, candidates must ensure that they are meeting the above mentioned eligibility criteria. The admission process is conducted through online mode. Admission to all the UG, PG, SS and PhD programmes is entrance-based. Entrance exams varies depending upon the programmes. Below is the step by step admission process for AIIMS Bibinagar:
Step 1: AIIMS Bibinagar Application
Step 2: Qualify the Entrance Exam
Candidates are need to appear for entrance exam (NEET/ INICET) for the desired course.
Step 3: Counselling/ Documents Verification
After qualifying the exam, candidates must attend theNEET counselling process for MBBS(whichever is applicable).
Step 4: Seat Allotment
AIIMS seats will be allotted to applicants on the basis of selected course during counselling process.
Step 5: Pay the Admission Fee/ Reporting at AIIMS
Selected candidates must pay the required fee to confirm the admission at AIIMS Bibinagar.

To ace one of the most challenging medical entrance exams of NEET UG 2025, candidates are required to prepare through a well-built strategy. However, to crack this exam a little advanced preparation strategy is a must. As the NEET UG 2025 exam is approaching, the quick pointers for the last-minute preparations are mentioned below:
Check here ontips and preparation strategies for NEET UG.

description: AIIMS Hyderabad cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Hyderabad cutoff 2024 has been released for NEET UG, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The AIIMS Hyderabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the NEET UG 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Hyderabad can refer to the table below to review the NEET UG and INI CET cutoff ranks for the past three years across various courses, specialisations and categories.

AIIMS Hyderabad NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1874 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Hyderabad MBBS cutoff 2025 was 1874 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 3464 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Hyderabad accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Hyderabad INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 306 to 25908 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radiodiagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 306. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Anatomy, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of 25908 for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radiodiagnosis, MS in General Surgery and MD in Otorhinolaryngology (ENT), with Round 3 closing ranks of 306, 978 and 1367, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Hyderabad B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 2175 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 2395 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3639 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 318 and 867.

reviews.review_heading: Best faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have AC and library is available. Also e-library is there. We have a ground for volleyball and other sports available. Badminton court is available. Medical facilities are also there. Mess is good and maintained clean. It is cleaned daily and maintained with hygiene. Wi-Fi is given to everyone in the hostel. Best infrastructure and services are there.

reviews.review_heading: Great for the reputation and value for money. Infrastructure is still developing further.
reviews.review_text: Currently, academics are conducted in the hospital building itself. The classrooms are well-equipped with projectors, ACs, and writing boards. The library is small but contains the required academic textbooks and literature for all courses and subjects. Academics will soon shift to the newly built academic block, which has modern infrastructure and will be equipped with better and more facilities. The hostels have both single-seater and two-seater rooms. Currently, students get double occupancy ...

reviews.review_heading: College life in AIIMS Bibinagar .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in college. Hostel rooms are good. Almost all infrastructure is present. Sports activities are less. Food in the mess is bad; need to get food from outside. Food from outside is manageable. Medical facilities are available. The canteen is yet to be opened. Wi-Fi is not available in hostel rooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of AIIMS-Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: The campus is still under construction. I think it may take nearly a year to complete, so better hostel facilities will be available. Now, we are on a temporary hostel campus near the main campus.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to explore students knowledge and get into research. Teachers are approachable.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available, and also in the boys' hostel, it is in the process for the girls' hostel. Laboratories and classrooms are well established, since it is a new college and it takes time to reach students' expectations. The food is average and there is only one canteen available, and less batches are there. Sports and cultural are excellent and students will enjoy everything.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, but the stipend offered is low.
reviews.review_text: Our annual fest's name is very interesting, Pyrexia. We didn't get a chance to enjoy the annual fest due to Covid 19. Our library has lots of books available. We have our coursebook, fiction, novel, comics, anything and everything. The library should be a little more spacious. The campus has all the games one would want to play. Our rooms are spacious and clean, with a single bed in each room. We can use any electronic machines in our room as the electrical bill is included in the hostel fee. Th...

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Founded in 2006, NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University is a private institute. It is located in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The institute is accredited with DCI. NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University provides UG, PG, Certificate and Doctorate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 15 courses across specialisations such as Prosthodontics, Public Health, Endodontics, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Oral Medicine & Radiology, Oral Pathology and Orthodontics. Some of the courses offered at this institute include BDS, MDS, UG Diploma, Ph.D. and Certificate. NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University fees ranges between INR 60,000 and 18,00,000. The student intake for these courses is 132. NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences. NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University offers all the campus facilities to students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Overview not available

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University.

review_content.Placements: The minimum percentage you require to take admission is 55% above. They give job in their hospitals, so take admission in this university to make your future bright and there are so many activities and programs, and there are about 99+ course in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Very short degree to achieve "Doctor" in their name, so kindly take admission in this university. If you take admission in this university, it’s a very good university, campus and all. There are so many joyful events, prom parties. There is no Wi-Fi, labs are good, and the library is AC.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good dental college with amazing facilities.

review_content.Placements: We all are 100 students in one batch. But we can work as JR in our hospital and can apply as faulty too here after completing our course. You can also work as a doctor here and can apply for a job as a professor also in the university for many courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are normally furnished. The hostel is way too good, the furniture and the facilities are good here. The mess is clean always, you have 24*7 medical availability here. Our university conducts many events of sports, cultural events, and many DJ nights.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I wish you agree with me.

review_content.Placements: About 100% of students were placed in my course. NIMS University is one of the best universities. It contains different types of facilities. It contains more than 100 beds in its hospital. They provide well-qualified doctors in our hospital. I'm so happy to join this university.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our dental college, the qualities of facilities are very good. The quality of facilities and infrastructure are available for my dental course. We have course-related laboratories, classrooms, dental clinics, lecture theatre rooms, dental chairs, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty and infrastructure are good. The college is recently accredited by NAAC.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college were average for our senior batch. Almost 8%-10% of the students were placed. The salary offered was ranged from Rs. 8,000-20,000 per month. Doctors from hospitals and clinics visited the campus for placements. They offered the role of a dentist. Almost 90% of the students got internships from our college. The stipend offered was Rs. 2,000-3,000 per month. There is no placement cell available here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi facility is not available in the college. The library is okay, but books need to be upgraded. Medical facilities are great. Sports and games aren't that good. However, they conduct sports activities during sports events. The food offered in the canteen is okay, but the quality of food offered in the mess is poor quality and is not of good taste. Hostel rooms are fine. Classrooms are nice and furnished.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a highly recommended university.

review_content.Placements: To be frank, the placements in dental are a few, but you should gain a professional degree, so don't worry about the placement. Some of the seniors got placed in some prestigious dental clinics across India, and some of the seniors are in abroad also. The international student exchange programme is also present. Many international students are also there in NIMS under every program. The minimum salary offered is Rs. 10,000 to Rs. 15,000 per month. The placement in dental depends upon your practical work. Patient flow in NIMS dental is good, and this will help you in gaining practical knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Highly recommended university.

review_content.Placements: To be very Frank placement in dental is less but you should gain a professional degree. So don't worry about placements. Some of my seniors got good placement in some prestigious dental clinic in India, and some of Senior are also got placed in abroad. International student exchange programme is also there. And many International students are also there in NIMs in every program. Minimum salary is 10000-15000 per month. Placement in dental depends upon your hard work. Patient flow in NIMs dental is very good, and this will be going to help you in gaining Practical knowledge.

Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

reviews.review_heading: Review of NIMS Dental College and Hospital, NIMS University.
reviews.review_text: Very short degree to achieve "Doctor" in their name, so kindly take admission in this university. If you take admission in this university, it’s a very good university, campus and all. There are so many joyful events, prom parties. There is no Wi-Fi, labs are good, and the library is AC.

reviews.review_heading: Good dental college with amazing facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are normally furnished. The hostel is way too good, the furniture and the facilities are good here. The mess is clean always, you have 24*7 medical availability here. Our university conducts many events of sports, cultural events, and many DJ nights.

reviews.review_heading: I wish you agree with me.
reviews.review_text: In our dental college, the qualities of facilities are very good. The quality of facilities and infrastructure are available for my dental course. We have course-related laboratories, classrooms, dental clinics, lecture theatre rooms, dental chairs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty and infrastructure are good. The college is recently accredited by NAAC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi facility is not available in the college. The library is okay, but books need to be upgraded. Medical facilities are great. Sports and games aren't that good. However, they conduct sports activities during sports events. The food offered in the canteen is okay, but the quality of food offered in the mess is poor quality and is not of good taste. Hostel rooms are fine. Classrooms are nice and furnished.

reviews.review_heading: It is a highly recommended university.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is still not available, but it is in progress, and we will get it soon. The lecture theatres are good and well-equipped. The library is full of the latest books and generals, NIMS has 1,000 bedded hospital and also two gardens for playing different sports. The hostel rooms are big with all facilities, and regular cleaning is done. The food in a mess is good. Water facility is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Highly recommended university.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is still not there but in progress, and we will get it soon, lecture theatres are good and well-equipped, the library is full of the latest books and generals, NIMs is1000 bedded hospital and also two gardens for playing different sports, hostel rooms are big and having all facility and regular cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with that because the campus is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel and rooms are nice, but one thing is that for the last two months. The rooms have not been properly cleaned. The mess food is average, meaning it is just enough for survival. Overall, it is nice, and facilities are good, but sometimes the coordinators do not work properly.

reviews.review_heading: Fairly satisfied, go for it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities are good over here. There is a playground for football and cricket; a gym; a swimming pool; a basketball court; a ko court; a tennis court; etc. are available. Hostels need improvement. The food quality is good. In-campus canteens are available. The road needs to be repaired.

reviews.review_heading: All the facilities provided by the college are good, and the infrastructure is also good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good. The university provides good and all facilities. From the library, students can get every book issued for 3 days. Labs are good, and the classrooms are also good. The cafe is also available inside the campus. Every type of food is served in the cafe.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides paid internship opportunities. Students got internships in our college hospital. The stipend offered is Rs. 27,000 per month. The salary package offered is 13 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty-student ratio is very good. There are around 4-7 professors and 8-9 senior assistants in every batch. Each course has 100 students. All faculty members are qualified. They have the best degrees. They are highly experienced in their fields. Exams are challenging and are conducted frequently throughout the year.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital.

review_content.Placements: Students must crack the NORCET exam to get permanent government jobs. You get paid internships. Placements are provided on a contract basis after the course completion. Other than B.Sc. Nursing, our college also provides MBBS course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Two students share a room. First preference is given to outsiders for accommodation, and then Delhi students are given priority. Mess is available, but there is no canteen. There are no playgrounds for various activities. Classrooms are well maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with this prestigious college.

review_content.Placements: All of the students get placements in both government and private hospitals. The highest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest salary offered is Rs 80,000 per month. The average salary ranges from Rs 10,000 per month to 1 LPA. The top recruiting hopsitals are among the top Delhi government hospitals like VMMC, SJ, and MAMC UCMS. All of the students get internships in Dr RML Hospital itself, and the top roles are team leader and doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good and is still in progress, a 16-floor multi-storeyed building is under construction. There are three lecture theatres in our college, 2 near the hospital, and one on the psychiatry block. Facilities in hostels are also good, clean, and mess food is average. In sports, students have badminton and table tennis courts, and students have to go to the stadium for cricket or football.

hostel_campus.college_name: Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Atal Bihar Vajpayee Institute of Medical Science in New Delhi For MBBS admission.
reviews.review_text: This college is very good. It provides many facilities like labs, classrooms, a garden, games like carrom and football, a playground, etc. A canteen facility is available in the college. It provides very tasty and good food. There is a sports team that organizes sports competitions every year.

reviews.review_heading: The True Reality of MBBS College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides single, double, and triple sharing rooms. The meal quality is standard and hygienic, with a varied and high-quality menu. The library is one of the best and most well-equipped in the country. The classrooms are large, air-conditioned, and equipped with whiteboards.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Two students share a room. First preference is given to outsiders for accommodation, and then Delhi students are given priority. Mess is available, but there is no canteen. There are no playgrounds for various activities. Classrooms are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this prestigious college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and is still in progress, a 16-floor multi-storeyed building is under construction. There are three lecture theatres in our college, 2 near the hospital, and one on the psychiatry block. Facilities in hostels are also good, clean, and mess food is average. In sports, students have badminton and table tennis courts, and students have to go to the stadium for cricket or football.

reviews.review_heading: It is a premier institute with a well-known hospital.
reviews.review_text: Apart from the lecture theatres, auditorium, etc., the college provides clinical exposure as well. Dr RML Hospital is well known as one of the best tertiary care institutes in the country. The hostel is currently 1km away from the college, but a new hostel on campus with ample rooms is currently under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences
reviews.review_text: Our college gets a huge amount of funds as it is under the central government. The infrastructure makes the college special. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The facilities available in the hostel are of the best quality.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college. But a bit dissatisfied with the administration.
reviews.review_text: We have a computer lab but there is only one lab for all. The library has almost all the books. So, it provides a lot of help as medical books are very costly. The mess serves good quality food. But all food tastes almost the same. We have an annual sports day once a year.

reviews.review_heading: I am really happy after getting admission in this college. It is very good college .
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good in our college. Labs are well-equipped and new machines are there. Lecture theatres are good and fully air-conditioned. The library has a lot of books and journals from many countries and big doctors. The canteen is feasible and very healthy food is provided in our canteen. Medical facilities are excellent as Rml hospital is associated with our college. We have a table tennis court and a cricket ground in our college.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges that has a very huge patient inflow and very good campus.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities required are available in our college. We have all the labs and the library has all the books and journals. We have two LT but there is no Wi-Fi available. The hostel is average but the mess food is good. You can order food from the canteen. The canteen food is better than the mess food. A new hostel is also under construction. Sports are not upto mark but we have a badminton court, table tennis, and a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihari Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences and Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Hospital.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides undergraduates labs with modern equipment, central ventilation, projectors, Wi-Fi, etc., for every subject which requires clinical understanding like physiology, microbiology, pathology, etc. Further, we have 2 lecture theatres, an auditorium in which usually the classes of the students are conducted. We have a big library which has almost all medical books, also have separate hostels for boys and girls on the campus with both single-seater rooms and double-seater rooms equi...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Atal Bihar Vajpayee Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college is one of the premiere MBBS institutes in Delhi and it comes under the Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University. The college is located in the centre of the city. The infrastructure of the college is still developing and needs much more improvement. Some labs are well-developed, while some are still being built. All the equipment is of the latest technology. Hostel facilities are only available for all India quota students, while SQ students are still struggling as day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: This medical college is in the best location in Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The college is a new one, so it has brand new classrooms and labs. They all are equipped with the latest equipment and facilities. The library is also well maintained in terms of infrastructure and learning materials, i.e., books and journals. A new hostel is under construction. The mess and canteen have good food at a reasonably low price.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best emerging medical colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The college is a bit new for the UG course, i.e., MBBS, so there is no dedicated MBBS building. So, currently, the campus is quite limited, but it is endowed with all the labs with the latest equipment, lecture theatre, library and reading room. We share our canteen and mess with PG residents.

reviews.review_heading: Nice faculty, administration staff. Lack of infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facilities. No sports facilities. Poor infrastructure. Hostel accommodation only for few students. No mess facilities for UG students. No canteen for UG students. No cafeteria for UG students. Library, lecture theatre and auditorium is well built.

faqs.answer: A:    MMMUT has a good record of placements for courses like BTech, MTech, MBA, MCA, etc. The the highest and average package offered during MMMUT placements stood at INR 48 LPA and INR 7 LPA, respectively. fees_and_eligibility.overview: MMMUT Gorakhpur offers BTech and BBA at the UG level and MTech, MCA, MBA, and MSc at the PG level. The duration of these programmes differs depending on the course curriculum. Candidates who have completed a Diploma in Engineering can also apply for admission to the BTech programme. Candidates can check the MMMUT Gorakhpur courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for studying at MMMUT for BTech course is INR 91300 for the 1st year (in 1st semester ) for a day scholar or non-hosteller student, it increases to INR 1,15,600. For a hosteller student (a security fee is also included in it that is refundable after the completion of the course). After 1st year (in 3rd semester) the fee is reduced to INR 82,900 for a non-hosteller and INR 102200 for a hosteler. Also, for a detailed fee structure, you can go to the official website of MMMUT.
faqs.question: What is the fees for studying at MMUT for B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: A:    For the General AI category students, the MMM Gorakhpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 ranged between 66331 and 120311, with B.Tech. Science and Engineering being the most competitive for admission. Please note that the cutoff ranks vary for different specialisations, rounds, and categories. MMM Gorakhpur BTech cutoff 2025 is tabulated below for all the BTech specialisation for Round 1:CourseJEE Main Round 1 Cutoff 2025 (General AI quota)B.Tech. in Civil Engineering120311B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering99383B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering107423B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering83366B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering66331B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering116448B.Tech. in Information Technology and Computer Application74645B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (IOT)89347
faqs.question: What is the cut off for BTech at MMM Gorakhpur?

faqs.answer: A:    Refer to the list of pointers below to know the seat intake for various BTech specialisations. Civil Engineering - 150Electrical Engineering - 150Mechanical Engineering - 150Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) - 150Computer Science & Engineering (CSE) - 180Chemical Engineering - 75Information Technology (IT) - 75Note: This information is from unofficial sourse and hence subject to change.
faqs.question: How many students can do B.Tech at MMMUT Gorakhpur?

faqs.answer: A:    No, direct admission in MMMUT is not possible. This autonomous university give admission on the basis of scores obtained in entrance examinations. All the seats of B.Tech is filled on the basis of JEE Main score, for BBA and B.Pharm you have to qualify CUET UG, to get admission in all the PG courses except M.Tech you should qualify CUET PG, and for M.Tech, admissions are given on the basis of GATE or Malaviya Entrance Test (MET) score. After entrance examination subsequent rounds of online counselling is done so as to get branch accordingly your rank secured . According to the rank obtained by the student, the seat is allotted without any biasing. Thus, you have to work hard to get into MMMUT Gorakhpur.
faqs.question: Can I join MMMUT Gorakhpur directly?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Tier 3 college-wise, it is good and improving.

review_content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students are placed in the CSE department. The highest package is 55 LPA, which is off-campus. The average package of on-campus placement is 6 LPA. The lowest package offered is of 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, IBM, Cognizant, TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), and Infosys. 75 percent of students got internships from my course, they did internships in TCS, Wipro Technologies, and Infosys. The top roles offered are Software Engineer and Cyber Security Analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the CSE department is good. The hostels are average, but they are big in size and contain a ground in between. Wi-Fi is provided both in the department and the hostel. Classrooms are better and newly made with air conditioning. The library has a vast collection of books, but it's not 24/7. The mess food provided is average. The mess fees are Rs. 18,000 for six months, and the hostel fees are Rs. 30,000 per year. There is a medical facility, but they don't have many medicines. You must go outside for a better curve. There are nearly all sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Huge campus, rude faculty, average placements.

review_content.Placements: Well, as I am in first year, I actually don't know much about placement. All I heard is that the highest package is somewhere about 54 LPA and it is off-campus placement. From seniors, we have heard that placement rates are pretty average. If you are trying to join this college on the basis of only placement, I recommend you choose some other college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well, in the starting phase, every first-year student lives under restrictions for three months, which means you cannot go outside on your own. Each student has to form a line, go to class, and return to the hostel after class, that’s all. It is very irritating. The food is pretty decent, so you can manage. We get a good variety with breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner. The campus is huge, with a sports ground, multiple departmental buildings, a library, Wi-Fi across the campus, and medical facilities.

review_summary.college_name: MMMUT Gorakhpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It is a good and underrated college of UP, and it is the best college of UP with NIRF ranking of 60.

content.Placements: So many students pass and get placement from here. The highest package of all time is approximately 55 LPA, with an average package of 8 LPA. Many companies like Microsoft, Google, LinkedIn, Unilever, and many more higher companies come to recruit the students. Many students of the college get internships at Adobe, Microsoft, Google, and many more. From my knowledge, at least 70 to 80 percent of students participate in it. The top branches of the college are CS, IT, IoT, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities and infrastructure are here a good Wi-Fi network, excellent labs, a good classroom, and one of the essential things, a good and big library. Food is best in my hostel mess. An ambulance and a doctor's facility are provided. All sports and game areas are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Balanced academics and extracurricular opportunities.

content.Placements: Our 2025 batch at MMMUT had a pretty solid placement season. Close to 85% of the students who were set for placement got offers, which was encouraging for everyone. The highest package touched around 59 LPA, while the lowest stood around 3-4LPA, and the average package was near 7LPA. Top recruiters include Amazon, NPCL, Bharat Electronics Ltd. IBM, Cognizant, Myntra, Accenture, Apollo, TCS, ACKO, Aditya Birla group are offering diverse opportunities across both II and Core engineering sectors. Internships were also a strong point, with about 60-65% of the students gaining industrial exposure through top companies like Amazon, Tcs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Tier 3 college-wise, it is good and improving.

content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students are placed in the CSE department. The highest package is 55 LPA, which is off-campus. The average package of on-campus placement is 6 LPA. The lowest package offered is of 3 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Amazon, IBM, Cognizant, TCS (Tata Consultancy Services), and Infosys. 75 percent of students got internships from my course, they did internships in TCS, Wipro Technologies, and Infosys. The top roles offered are Software Engineer and Cyber Security Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the CSE department is good. The hostels are average, but they are big in size and contain a ground in between. Wi-Fi is provided both in the department and the hostel. Classrooms are better and newly made with air conditioning. The library has a vast collection of books, but it's not 24/7. The mess food provided is average. The mess fees are Rs. 18,000 for six months, and the hostel fees are Rs. 30,000 per year. There is a medical facility, but they don't have many medicines. You must go outside for a better curve. There are nearly all sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Huge campus, rude faculty, average placements.

content.Placements: Well, as I am in first year, I actually don't know much about placement. All I heard is that the highest package is somewhere about 54 LPA and it is off-campus placement. From seniors, we have heard that placement rates are pretty average. If you are trying to join this college on the basis of only placement, I recommend you choose some other college.
content.Infrastructure: Well, in the starting phase, every first-year student lives under restrictions for three months, which means you cannot go outside on your own. Each student has to form a line, go to class, and return to the hostel after class, that’s all. It is very irritating. The food is pretty decent, so you can manage. We get a good variety with breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner. The campus is huge, with a sports ground, multiple departmental buildings, a library, Wi-Fi across the campus, and medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Not much dissatisfied but overall experience is okay. A good decent college.

content.Placements: Placement in 2021 is 100 percent. The companies that come for placement were Cummins Wheel India. Ltd Flipkart etc. The lowest package for placement is 1.6LPA. The highest role for the placement was Jr. Engineer. Some student got their dream job as they required.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostels are okay, but the mess food is average, as no one can compare it with home food. Wi-Fi is 24hrs classrooms are Centralized AC library is the 3rd the biggest in UP. Medical facilities are available, as a dispensary is there, and sports facilities are also available. Hostel rooms are about 4 persons in 1 room, plus bathrooms are clean, 4 times meal in a day. All includes under 18000 rupees in 6 months and hostel is 30000 for a year.

admission_overview.college_name: MMMUT Gorakhpur Course Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, CUET, Dates, Application & Selection Process

paragraphs: MMMUT Gorakhpur admission 2025 is entirely entrance-based.MMMUToffers various UG, PG and Doctoral programmes in the fields of Engineering, Technology, Management, etc. Candidates seeking MMMUT admissions must qualify for the national-level entrance exam for respective courses. For admission to popular courses such as BTech and MTech, candidates have to qualify for JEE Main and GATE, respectively. Whereas, as per the MMMUT admission process, valid CUET UG & CUET PG scores are required to get admission to UG & PG courses. Further, a common MMMUT counselling process is conducted in online mode for the final seat allotment. Read more about MMMUT admission in the following article.

MMMUT offers full-time UG & PG courses. For admission to any of the courses, it's mandatory to fulfil MMMUT eligibility criteria along with the selection criteria for the respective courses. Candidates can also apply for the second year of BTech and BPharm via valid CUET UG scores. Admission to all courses at MMMUT is done through scores of national-level entrance exams. Further, PhD course is offered in both full-time and part-time modes. The university conducts an in-house entrance exam to admit eligible candidates for PhD. Find below the course-wiseMadan Mohan Malaviya University of Technology courseadmissions 2025:
BTech & BTech (Lateral Entry)
Class 12 pass in PCM stream with 60% aggregate
JEE Main& CUET (for BTech Lateral Entry)
Class 12 pass in PCM or PCB stream with 55% aggregate
Class 12 pass in any discipline with 55% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree in relevant Science stream with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate
BTech in relevant discipline with first division marks
Bachelor's and Master’s degree in Engineering/ Technology/ Science/ Management or equivalent in the relevant discipline
Note:A 5% relaxation in marks is given to the reserved category students.

MMMUT seats may vary for all UG & PG courses. The highest number of seats are available for BTech and the lowest number of seats are available for MBA and MCA. Further, the MMMUT fees include various components such as Tuition Fees, Registration Fees, Hostel Charges, Examination Fees, etc. Candidates can check out the courses-wise MMMUT fees and seats for all courses:
MMMUT admission process consists of multiple rounds, which is inclusive of applying for the course, appearing for the entrance exam, counselling registration and more. Candidates
Step 1: MMMUT Application Process 2025

For admission to MMMUT Gorakhpur, candidates must visit the official website of the respective entrance exams and apply for the same along with paying the application fee. Candidates can apply for their desired course and appear for the exam.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

MMMUT admissions are entirely entrance-based. Admission to all UG & PG courses, except BTech and MTech is done through a valid CUET UG & CUET PG entrance exam scores, respectively. Further, candidates seeking admission to BTech and MTech are done based on scores of JEE Main and GATE exams. The university conducts MET exam for the selection of eligible candidates for PhD courses.
Step 3: Counselling Registration

After the declaration of the final results of the respective entrance exams, candidates have to apply for on online counselling process on the MMMUT's official website. Aspirants have to submit their entrance exam scores, lock in their course choice and pay the registration amount of INR 2,500.
Step 4: Seat Allotment and Document Verification

The university will allocate seats to candidates through an online counselling process. If seats remain vacant, the university release conducts spot counselling to fill the remaining seats. At last, the selected candidates have to submit their documents online for verification.
For more information about MMMUT check out the below video:

faqs.answer: Madan Mohan Malaviya University of Technology (MMMUT) does not offer direct admissions to any of its courses. Candidates wanting to apply for MCA course at MMMUT need to have a valid score of CUET-PG. There is no other provision for admission to this course.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA at MMMUT Gorakhpur?
faqs.answer: At MMMUT, students can study a two-year MBA course. This  course is affiliated with AKTU and taught by theMadan Mohan Malaviya University of Technology (MMMUT)respectively. The total seat intake for MMMUT MBA courses is 75. Admission in this course is given on the basis of CUET (PG) score or Malaviya Entrance Test (MET) which is conducted by MMMUT itself. There are some eligibility criterias also to get admissionn into this which includes  that the candidate should have passed  from the recognised Bachelor’s degree of minimum three years duration from any University of India as recognised by UGC with at least 50% marks (45% in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST category).

faqs.question: Can I join MMMUT Gorakhpur directly?
faqs.answer: No, direct admission in MMMUT is not possible. This autonomous university give admission on the basis of scores obtained in entrance examinations. All the seats of B.Tech is filled on the basis of JEE Main score, for BBA and B.Pharm you have to qualify CUET UG, to get admission in all the PG courses except M.Tech you should qualify CUET PG, and for M.Tech, admissions are given on the basis of GATE or Malaviya Entrance Test (MET) score. After entrance examination subsequent rounds of online counselling is done so as to get branch accordingly your rank secured . According to the rank obtained by the student, the seat is allotted without any biasing. Thus, you have to work hard to get into MMMUT Gorakhpur.

faqs.question: Are admissions at MMMUT Gorakhpur entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Admissions at MMMUT Gorakhpur are completely entrance-based. You have to give entrance exam to get admission in any course offered by the college. All the seats of B.Tech is filled on the basis of JEE Main score, for BBA and B.Pharm you have to qualify CUET UG, to get admission in all the PG courses except M.Tech you should qualify CUET PG, and for M.Tech, admissions are given on the basis of GATE or Malaviya Entrance Test (MET) score. After entrance examination subsequent rounds of online counselling is done so as to get branch accordingly your rank secured . According to the rank obtained by the student, the seat is allotted without any biasing. Thus, you have to work hard to get into MMMUT Gorakhpur.

placement_data.title: MMMUT Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: MMMUT concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during MMMUT placements in 2025 stood at INR 48 LPA and INR 7 LPA , respectively. Further, over 100 recruiters participated in 2025 placements and offered over 900 jobs to the students of the 2025 batch. The top recruiters of Madan Mohan Malviya University of Technology in 2025 included Amazon, NPCL, Bharat Electronics Limited, IBM, Cognizant, Aditya Birla Group, Myntra, Accenture, Apollo, TCS, ACKO, etc.

MMMUT has a placement cell that is responsible for securing lucrative career opportunities for students. The institute invites companies from various sectors to conduct the placement process on campus premises.

faqs.question: What is the fees for studying at MMUT for B.Tech course?
faqs.answer: The fee for studying at MMMUT for BTech course is INR 91300 for the 1st year (in 1st semester ) for a day scholar or non-hosteller student, it increases to INR 1,15,600. For a hosteller student (a security fee is also included in it that is refundable after the completion of the course). description: The MMMUT Gorakhpur cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to the BTech programme based on candidates' performance in the JEE Main entrance exam. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can check out the MMMUT Gorakhpur JEE Main cutoff 2025 in the exam-wise section below across different courses, rounds and categories. Further updates are below:

MMMUT Gorakhpur accepts several national-level entrance exams for admission to its UG courses. The institute accepts JEE Main scores for BTech, followed by BTech counselling rounds. Candidates seeking admission to MMMUT Gorakhpur can refer to the table below to check the entrance exams accepted by the institute for different courses. Also available is the MMMUT Gorakhpur course-wise cutoff range of 2024 for the General AI category students. For 2025, the cutoff will be released soon.

MMMUT Gorakhpur cutoff 2025 was released via MMMUT entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 76643 and 184885 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 76643, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 66331.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 76643.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #99 in the Overall category, #68 under University, #60 under Engineering, #83 under Management, and #23 under State Public University. The institute is ranked as one of the best institutes for its top class faculty. The article mentioned in this space covers all the details you need if you are interested in MMMUT Gorakhpur rankings.

nirf.description:
MMMUT Gorakhpur has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for MMMUT Gorakhpur indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. When evaluated against the ranking of the past years, it has been noticed that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown an increasing trend. In 2025, MMMUT Gorakhpur climbed 2 ranks to #99 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'University' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, MMMUT Gorakhpur climbed 26 ranks to #68 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The institute has displayed an increasing trend in the 'Engineering' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, MMMUT Gorakhpur climbed 24 ranks to #60 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.

qs_world.description:
As per the overall score, MMMUT Gorakhpur has been placed at a good position by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2026, MMMUT Gorakhpur fell 400 ranks to #1301 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'Southern Asia' category, the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MMMUT Gorakhpur fell 137 ranks to #429 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: MMMUT Gorakhpur Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The University is residential institution with five boys' hostels named Subhash Bhawan, Raman Bhawan, Vishweswaraya Bhawan (exclusively for first year boys), Tagore Bhawan and Ambedkar Bhawan and three girls' hostels named Saraswati Bhawan, Sarojani Bhawan and Kalpna Chawla Bhawan. These hostels accommodate a total of about 1470 students. The hostels are well furnished with necessary amenities available with in hostel premises. The leased line Internet facility is available for 24x7 hours (except University hours) in every room of each hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good and underrated college of UP, and it is the best college of UP with NIRF ranking of 60.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are here a good Wi-Fi network, excellent labs, a good classroom, and one of the essential things, a good and big library. Food is best in my hostel mess. An ambulance and a doctor's facility are provided. All sports and game areas are there.

reviews.review_heading: Balanced academics and extracurricular opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure includes Wi-Fi, a proper computer lab, an AI/ml lab, a Chemistry lab, a Physics research lab, spacious classrooms with a smart board, and a well-stocked library for study and research. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, though the mess food quality varies. Medical support is available on campus, and sports grounds for cricket and football, volleyball, along with games keep student life active.

reviews.review_heading: Tier 3 college-wise, it is good and improving.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the CSE department is good. The hostels are average, but they are big in size and contain a ground in between. Wi-Fi is provided both in the department and the hostel. Classrooms are better and newly made with air conditioning. The library has a vast collection of books, but it's not 24/7. The mess food provided is average. The mess fees are Rs. 18,000 for six months, and the hostel fees are Rs. 30,000 per year. There is a medical facility, but they don't have many medicine...

reviews.review_heading: Huge campus, rude faculty, average placements.
reviews.review_text: Well, in the starting phase, every first-year student lives under restrictions for three months, which means you cannot go outside on your own. Each student has to form a line, go to class, and return to the hostel after class, that’s all. It is very irritating. The food is pretty decent, so you can manage. We get a good variety with breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner. The campus is huge, with a sports ground, multiple departmental buildings, a library, Wi-Fi across the campus, and medical fac...

reviews.review_heading: Not much dissatisfied but overall experience is okay. A good decent college.
reviews.review_text: Our hostels are okay, but the mess food is average, as no one can compare it with home food. Wi-Fi is 24hrs classrooms are Centralized AC library is the 3rd the biggest in UP. Medical facilities are available, as a dispensary is there, and sports facilities are also available. Hostel rooms are about 4 persons in 1 room, plus bathrooms are clean, 4 times meal in a day. All includes under 18000 rupees in 6 months and hostel is 30000 for a year.

reviews.review_heading: MMMUT Gorakhpur college review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course were good. Wi-Fi facilities were available in the whole campus building. Modern classrooms with digital boards and projectors were available. Computer labs were also mostly working. A library was present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are decent. Rooms are comfortable, and the environment is good for studying. The mess food is average, some days good, and some days just manageable, but overall okay for students. The campus also has sports grounds, a gym, a health centre, and a decent canteen. The hostel area feels safe and has all the basic facilities like water, electricity backup, and common rooms. The campus and hostel experience is pretty good and student-friendly. The infrastructure for Civil Engineerin...

reviews.review_heading: MMMUT Information Technology review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is getting updated every year. There is Wi-Fi available in the whole campus, including the hostels. The labs are also updated. There are the best PC processors established in the ITCA lab. The hostel is also well & good. The mess is run by the students themselves. The hostel mess is also good. There are restrictions for first-year students. There is also a medical facility available in the college itself.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MMMUT Gorakhpur.
reviews.review_text: It is average, not the most luxurious and modern. Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The library is also good. Regarding the hostel facility, it is not so perfect. The mess food menu is decided by the student group itself. For games and sports, a proper student club is available that organizes events in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty and college life.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available 24 hours. Classrooms are all smart and air-conditioned. The library is one of the top libraries. Hostel rooms are quite good. The mess is average, but the variety is more, and facilities are great. A canteen is also available 24 hours if you are craving food.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement in CSE.
reviews.review_text: College is old-fashioned with need of developed infrastructure. Provides Wi-Fi facility, 2 libraries & classrooms are air-conditioned. Few labs are working. Hostel needs renovation. Mess food is average. Medical facility is provided & sports facility too.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Madan Mohan Malviya University of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very poor, only the main auditorium is well maintained. Otherwise main academic building and hostel all are not that much good.

reviews.review_heading: Quite a satisfactory college.
reviews.review_text: The college was established in 1962, and it needed renovation in some parts. The lecture halls for 1st year students are quite good and air-conditioned. College provides the facility of library and internet. Hostel provides good food and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: You will find very supportive seniors here who are ready to help you every step.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, infrastructure is very average. If we talk about hostel, first year girls are very good compared to the other hostels. All other hostels including boys and girls have decent infrastructure. Wi-Fi facilities are available in every hostel.

reviews.review_heading: MMMUT electrical engineering review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. The campus is fully Wi-Fi enabled. The labs are also updated. The classrooms have smart board now. This college has dedicated library with a lot of books and capacity. Many students are studying daily. Infrastructure is also developing day-by-day. The hostel is also now developed. The first year hostels have done renovation work recently. The food quality is also awesome. The hostel mess is handled by the students.

college_info.college_name: MMMUT Gorakhpur Scholarship Details

paragraphs: To encourage meritorious students, MMMUT Gorakhpur offer scholarship and rewards. MMM University of Technology facilitates university medals, sponsored medals, sponsored scholarships, scholarships by the government of Uttar Pradesh, national scholarships and more. To avail of a scholarship, aspirant should be fulfilling the prescribed criteria. The scholarships are given as per the conditions prescribed by university ordiances.

The fee for studying at MMMUT for BTech course is INR 91300 for the 1st year (in 1st semester ) for a day scholar or non-hosteller student, it increases to INR 1,15,600. For a hosteller student (a security fee is also included in it that is refundable after the completion of the course). After 1st year (in 3rd semester) the fee is reduced to INR 82,900 for a non-hosteller and INR 102200 for a hosteler. Also, for a detailed fee structure, you can go to the official website of MMMUT.

Candidates applying for admission at MMMUT Gorakhpur are only required to pay the counselling application form fee, which is INR 2,500 for all the programmes. Further, the application fee of the accepted entrance exams for admission is mentioned below:

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Infrastructure: The campus is good. All hostels are average. I would suggest staying in a PG. It is not possible to get a single room in every hostel. Sometimes, we face water issues.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. We have to learn things by ourselves. Our teachers share PDFs and slides. They teach the concepts through presentations. All faculty members are quite strict.
content.Other: Our college provides skills that are necessary for our careers. It provides many certificate programs. It guides us through our career path. Our college provides many opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is helpful for the future.

content.Placements: Around 25% of students get placed in our course. Many students get placement offers in our college. B. pharma course students got placed in many companies.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is good and neat. Different variety of food items and snacks are served in our college. It serves both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food items. Medical facilities are available 24 hours. Our college has a library that consists of all types of books for all the courses. Classrooms are good.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are good, well-qualified, and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is good. Semester exams are easy. The maximum pass percentage is 50%. It is helpful for students' future.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides the best infrastructure and placements.

content.Infrastructure: Our college has three vast grounds for various sports. It has a well-developed indoor sports complex. All classrooms are spacious. Each classroom can accommodate around 100 students. Each classroom has a projector to educate us in advanced methods by showing slides and videos. Our has a huge central library. It provides textual knowledge to students.

individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in all aspects.

Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Ranbaxy Laboratories, Alembic Pharmaceuticals, Biocon Ltd, Candela Healthcare Ltd, Vertex Pharma Chemicals, Apex Laboratories, etc. Top roles offered are drug inspector, quality control manager, teacher, entrepreneur, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-equipped with tables and chairs for every individual student. Every classroom has a projector and screen. Laboratories have all apparatus and chemicals for practicals. We can borrow a lot of books from our library. The hostel provides all facilities. The hostel food is good. individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This college has average placements.

content.Placements: Less than 10% of students got placed. Even the best-placed students have not yet been called to work. The average salary would be around Rs. 15,000 per month. Not too many companies come for placements. Mostly, production or industry-related companies come with Rs. 10,000 per month to Rs. 15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the topmost facilities for studies. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs have the required equipment. Each classroom is provided with a projector to facilitate learning with presentations. The hostel has average facilities, and the mess food is not up to the mark. On campus, a canteen is provided.

Amity University Lucknow offers various programmes to students at UG, PG, and PhD levels. The university offers courses in streams like Engineering, Animation, Computer Science, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, Fine Arts, etc. At the UG level, the university offers courses like BSc, LLB, BCom, BA, BBA, etc. for a duration of 3 years.

At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MA, MSc, MTech, MCom, MFA, and other programmes. They can also enroll in programmes and other courses at the Amity University campus in Lucknow. overview_faqs.question: What is fees of Amity Lucknow BTech course?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Amity Lucknow BTech ranges between INR 8.3 lakh - INR 15.4 lakh as per official sources. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BTech course is based on national or state-level Engineering entrance exam or AMCAT score. The university also accepts CUET UG or JEE Main score for admission to all BTech specialisations, except 3 Continent and CSE International. For International specialisation, Amity conducts an English test followed by a PI round. The university also accepts NEET score for BTech Biotechnology. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

overview_faqs.question: What should I do If I fail to deposit Amity Lucknow fee on time?
overview_faqs.answer: In case a student fails to pay the Amity University Lucknow fee within the specified time, he or she need to approach the admission office via 'Post/ track your query' link available on the admission microsite. The admission committee of the university considers request for extension of date depending on the availability of the seats.
