review_summary.college_name: Amity University Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com. Hons.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.

content.Placements: The percent of students placed in this course is 90%. The highest package for this course was 4,50,000, and the lowest was 2,00,000. The top recruiting companies include Amazon, HCL, etc. 100% of students get internships from the course in HCL. Mostly, data analyst roles are available.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.

content.Placements: After BBA, placements are not that high that year. Around 35% of students got placed. The highest package for a graduation is 7.9 LPA. Companies like HDFC Bank, RBL Bank, and Mahindra Finance come to the campus. Sales executive roles are offered by recruiters. Also, the internship percentage is very high.
content.Infrastructure: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.

content.Placements: Around 50% students were placed, the highest package is 4.5 LPA, and it is in Quality Assurance. The top recruiting companies are Cipla, Alkem Laboratories, Pfizer, etc. Overall, the placement is average, but the placement cell tries its best to get every student placed in a good company with a good package.
content.Infrastructure: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

individual_reviews.course: LL.M in Criminal Law - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.

content.Placements: Self-placements are a better option here since few recruiters visit the college in this branch for placements, so we can head to Noida. It is a branch for better recruiters. Here we can get a good LL.M degree of value in no time, and with ease we can score well. All these help in future career prospects.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Counselling Psychology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of my college.

content.Placements: Since I had to study further, as well as most of my batchmates wanted the same. Placement is not a factor in the course. Even though there are provisions for placement in many publishing houses and companies in post is content/creative writers with CTC around 2 LPA. As far as internships, we have a summer project, where we have to submit a detailed research paper. This paper is a subject as in whole and is taken very seriously. Weekly reports have to be represented on the progress, and each individual is assigned a mentor. There is no stipend.
content.Infrastructure: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Yes, Amity Lucknow provides direct admission to candidates fufiling the below-mentioned criteria:Candidates must pass Class 12 (CBSE/ ISC/ State Boards) with at least 80% aggregate for direct admission to UG courses. Aspirants eligible for direct admission get exemption from the entrance exam.Aspirants with at least 70 percentile in CAT/ MAT exam are eligible for direct admission to MBA course. Such candidates are exempted from entrance test and can directly come for GDPI round.Direct admission is not applicable on non-MBA course.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BBA at Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: A pass in Class 12 with at least 55% aggregate is required to apply for BBA specialisations. The minimum aggregate is not specified by the university for BBA Tourism Management. Candidates passing Class 12 with at least 80% aggregate are eligible for direct admission to BBA course. Additionally, admission to BBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam or CUET UG score. As soon as the selection rounds are over, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university. The total tuition fee for BBA is ranges between INR 8.58 Lacs and INR 12.36 Lacs as per an unofficial source. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled.

faqs.question: How can I get admission a Amity University Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Amity University Lucknow offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. The university accepts scores in JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, Amity Test, etc. for a few courses. Aspirants can get admission after submission of application in merit-based courses. Selected candidates need to pay the programme fees to confirm their seat in the university.

placement_data.title: Amity University Lucknow Placement Overview 2026
paragraphs: The Amity University Lucknow placement report 2026 has not been out as of yet. While the Amity University placement for school of Engineering has been out. The highest package offered was INR 35.9 LPA . The average package offered was INR 9.6 LPA . The median package offered was INR 6 LPA . Three companies offered international offers to the students. The top recruiters that participated during the placement drive 2025 were Amazon, Google, IBM and many more.

During the Amity Lucknow placement drive 2025, top companies such as EY, Deloitte, Pepsi, Google, Facebook among others participated. The placement cell conducts skill building workshops and pre placement mock series. The cell also keep close corporations with leading companies.

outlook.description:
Amity University Lucknow has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'BBA' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2024. Amity University Lucknow's rankings in 'BBA' category have shown stability in trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, Amity University Lucknow's rank is #109, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed a fluctuating trend in the 'BCA' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, Amity University Lucknow's rank is #30, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: I have pursued B.Com (Hons) from Amity University Lucknow; great campus, best college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the B.Com course include a library, classrooms, and Wi-Fi. The hostel quality was quite good, but it could be more well-structured, and the quality of food available in the mess was great in taste. Every weekend they have something special. Other than this, a canteen, medical store, and sports facilities were also available.

reviews.review_heading: BBA at Amity University, Lucknow: The best time of my life.
reviews.review_text: At Amity University, you will always get top-class infrastructure available. Libraries, classes, labs, and even the corridors are so neat and clean, you always feel like being in the best college. The food in the mess is also served fresh and tasty. For every medical emergency, there is a van always available, and first aid is easily available. Every sport is played, like table tennis, lawn tennis, football, cricket, volleyball, basketball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is great. You can study and develop connections.
reviews.review_text: The Amity University Lucknow campus has impressive infrastructure that creates a perfect environment for learning and growing, the university provides both indoor and outdoor sports facilities. The playgrounds are well maintained, and the classrooms are great.

reviews.review_heading: It is okay for a master's degree with no good placements. We get a good experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and it was recently renovated. The college has good classrooms and an AC campus. The only issue is drinking water, and the rest is nice. Around the campus, we can get access to anything, so it is a highlight. A brilliant central library is a key structure with a clock tower above it.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: College can not provide a hostel I live in civil line Jabalpur. There are many hostels and the charge is Rs 4,000 approximately. Hostel condition is very good. The students live in a hostel and they enjoy their life.

reviews.review_heading: We have a heavy workload, and too much emphasis on attendance, but good networking and internships.
reviews.review_text: The department is overall nice. The infrastructure and campus are quite good but need more maintenance. The library is an amazing place to be in, canteen and food services are okay. Overall it is good, still needs to improve a lot. There is ample ground space and opportunities to engage in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is great.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and security are great. The hostel facility is good. The food is not that great. The campus has great Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. The library is so beautiful with all the course books and extracurricular books as well. The quality of food in the mess is not at all good. Canteen food is better than mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it provides the best and most reliable packages.
reviews.review_text: Libraries and hostel rooms are fantastic and clean. The service that is provided in the library and classrooms is very impressive, but sometimes Wi-Fi stops working, which is a manageable point. Medical facilities are also provided there for some small health issues. Ground is very big, so students can enjoy their recess and free time.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, bedsheet pillow and pillow cover were provided and table was provided. Meal quality was not so good but breakfast was really very good. We could complete the registration from the official website of Amity University Lucknow.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Amity University, Lucknow campus.
reviews.review_text: We have here Wi-Fi connections, computer labs, classrooms, and library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is very good with good cleanliness, supportive wardens and staff. Rooms are also quite good and if we look for medical facilities here we have an infirmary in our hostel which has well-specialized doctors. And if we talk about sports and games here is very nice as we have a big backyard ground where we have basketball court, badminton court, cricket ground, and many indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Lucknow For M.Sc.  MB Course admission in 25-26.
reviews.review_text: This course's infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality materials and products. The college has classrooms, bathrooms, a library, a canteen, a hostel, etc. The canteen facilities are also good and there are many varieties of food available.

reviews.review_heading: Amity University in Uttar Pradesh, course and admission.
reviews.review_text: In this college, library facilities are available and there are all subject books present in the cell. Department classroom is very clean and the bathroom also. In this college, sports committee is organizing sports and games facilities but it is not free. There are charges and rise pool facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: My personal experience in Amity University Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good and furnished with all the facilities provided on the campus itself. Talking about the library, it is the best place on the whole campus to sit and study with the best decor. Here, the vibes are really impressive. Wi-Fi for the whole time is provided and we also have water coolers, a canteen, the best sitting areas, and fully air-conditioned corridors and classes too.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure structure is well maintained. The campus is very beautiful. Wi-Fi also works nicely. Classrooms are now maintained. The library is also very good. Books are available over there but the laboratories are not so okay because the AC doesn't work. Instruments and most chemicals are not available. Hostels are not at all good they are just overpriced and the mess food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure with an amazing youth fest and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Labs are well equipped with the proper chemicals available. Classrooms have good Wi-Fi coverage. The best part is the library. We have a lot of books to read and it was built beautifully. The hostels are good and have a well-equipped gym and sports room on the campus.

college_info.college_name: Amity University Lucknow

data.description: Amity University Lucknow has an Anti-Ragging Cell. Hence, the freshers will never meet with this problem while studying in this college. The college premises has strict laws against the student found guilty of any act such as abusing, assaulting, threatening, teasing and embarrassment to new students, among others.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Amity University, Lucknow

They are very successful in offering placements for students in good companies and improving their skills for the job.

paragraphs: Amity University Lucknow offers a MBA course to students at the PG level. It is offered in full-time mode for 2 years. The total tuition fee of MBA at Amity Lucknow ranges between INR 10.4 Lacs and INR 13.8 lakh.

INR 4 lakh and INR 13.7 lakh is the total tuition fee range for BBA as per official sources. The fee varies as per the specialisation. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to BBA courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university also accepts CUET UG score for providing admission to BBA course. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

INR 10.4 lakh - INR 13.8 lakh is the total tuition fee range at Amity Lucknow for  MBA course. Aspirants are required to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds to confirm their seats. Admission to MBA course is based on national-level entrance exam CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. The university also conducts AMCAT for providing admission to MBA course. Additionally, candidates need to qualify English test for admission to MBA International. The shortlisted candidates are further called for a personal interview round. In case, a candidate is unable to pay the fee within the specified time, his or her admission will stand cancelled. The application fee is waived off for admission at Amity Lucknow.

college_info.intro:
PES College Bangalore is famous for its flagship BTech, MBA, & BSc courses. Studying these PESU Bangalore flagship programmes at PES University helps to support the professional and personal growth of the students. This is done through a holistic and immersive learning experience. BTech students engage with the corporate sector on a variety of platforms ranging from industry visits, workshops, hackathons, internships, and industry-wide events such as summits, seminars, conferences, and others. BTech Computer Science & Engineering (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) is one of the most popularly opted specialisation. Some of the key highlights of this programme are below:
PES University Bangalore MBA is a full-time, 2-year programme, which consists of a core curriculum along with an internship and various elective courses. PES MBA Bangalore is offered in various major specialisations, including Business Analytics, Finance, Marketing, Human Capital, and Operation Management, among others. The PESU Venture Labs, established by the university, funds the business ideas of students, to help them realise their dream of becoming an entrepreneur. Here is more info around PES College Bangalore courses:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Loved in first year but not in later years

Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. Some of the top recruiters include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to MCA at PES University, there is minimum eligibility criteria that needs to fulfil before applying for this course. Interested candidates need to pass graduation either with a minimum 50% aggregate in BSc/BCom/BA with Mathematics as one of the subjects at Class 12 or graduation level or in BCA with a minimum 50% aggregate. Final year students can also apply on a provisional basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria at the time of admission. The admission to MCA course will be based on PESSAT or PGCET score.
faqs.question: What is the qualification for MCA in PES University?

The university considers JEE Main scores for admission to all the BTech specialisations, including Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and more. The other option for the BTech course admission is to qualify PESSAT or KCET entrance exams. reviews_list.review_title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

review_content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

review_summary.college_name: PES University Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: A total of 740 in the seniors' batch. Around 540 have been placed, and many have gone for higher studies. The highest package was 60 LPA. The median is around 12-13 LPA, and the lowest is not available. Companies like Zomato, IBM, Google, AWS, etc., come to this college. The top roles include SDE and ML engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.

content.Placements: In electronics and communication the placement was not that good compared to CSE till last year. The placements are decent for ECE but then in the last year there is a slight dip in the placements for CSE. The placement ratio is almost the same as before.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Placements are really good, mainly because the college is located in a city like Bangalore. Compared to other colleges such as BMS and MSRIT, the placements are much better. They have a median package of 18 to 20 LPA for the AIML course, which is likely to increase in the future.
content.Infrastructure: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.

content.Placements: So 80-90% of students from my course got placed in top companies, and most of us managed to get jobs through campus placement. The highest salary package offered in our course is around 25 to 26 LPA. The average package is roughly around 11-13 LPA. Some of the top companies include KPMG, Deloitte, HDFC Bank, TCS, DELL, etc. Around 80-95% students got internships, and some companies offering internships are Wipro and Accenture. The roles offered through placement and internships are legal advisory, business development, legal research, and consulting.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Completely worth a one-time investment.

content.Placements: According to our seniors and the placement information given by them, around 85-90% of the people who were eligible for placements were offered internships/placements. The highest package was around 56-60 LPA last year, the lowest was maybe 3.2 LPA, and the average is 12 LPA. The whole MAANG came itself. Everybody who was eligible got an internship. Software Engineer/ SDE-2, Data Analyst, and Data Engineer roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

admission_overview.college_name: PES University Bangalore Admission 2026: Dates, Eligibility and Selection Fee & Application

admission_overview.title: PES University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PES University admission 2026 is open for UG, PG and PhD programmes. The private university in Bangalore offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations at UG, PG and doctoral levels. programs are offered in the domains of Engineering, Maedicine, Management and Life Sciences. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice. Admission in the university is primarily entrance-based. The university accepts national-level entrance exams like JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc. for specific courses. In addition, PES University conducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT for UG and PG programmes. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode. requirements of return on investment for the institution's high fee costs are met with competitive placements.

Candidates can apply for UG courses after Class 12 and PG courses after completing graduation. The university conducts PESSAT for admission to various courses. faqs.answer: PES Bangalore offers courses at the UG, PG and PhD level across the fields of Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, Design, Management and Commerce, Economics and many more, The University offers these courses on the basis of merit and various accepted entrance exams. PES Bangalore fee structure includes a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.9 Lacs to INR 20 Lakh. In comparison to other universities, the cost of academia is higher. However, the University various other facilities apart from academia which is worth the cost being paid.
faqs.question: How costly is PES University?

paragraphs: PES University admission 2026is majorly based on entrance scores. It accepts scores of certain entrance exams such as-JEE Main, CAT, GATE, KCET, etc.PES Universityconducts its in-house entrance exam-PESSAT. The university offers 27 degree courses in various specialisations atUG, PG and doctoral levels. Interested candidates can register online for admission to the course of their choice.PES University admissionto UG and PG courses is based on PESSAT score. There are around 27 courses offered in multiple streams at PES. The university offers courses only in full time/offline mode.

PES University admission processincludes registration, entrance exam, counselling, etc. Candidates are first required to register for any of the preferred course. Check below, detailed step wise admission process for PES University:
1. Application

Application forms are available online on the official website of the university. There is a application fee of INR 1,200 which needs to be paid for submitting the form.Candidates must also keep the specified documents ready for registration.
2. Slot Booking

After submission of the form, the candidates have to book a slot for the PESSAT exam. This step is valid only for candidates appearing for PESSAT. Once they have booked their slot, an admit card will be issued. Aspirants must download their admit card.
3. Selection Rounds

PES University admission criteria include eligibility and an entrance exam followed by other selection rounds. The criteria vary as per the course. PESSAT conducted by PES University is accepted for admission to all the courses. National or state-level entrance exams like JEE Main, KCET, GATE, etc. are required for admission to specific courses. PES conducts an interview round for shortlisted candidates for admission to some courses.
STEP 4: Counselling

The selected candidates are further called for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to payPES University feeto get a seat in the university. Once the fee is paid, candidates can report to the institute.

PES University feesinclude multiple components, such as the tuition fee, hostel fee, etc. The fee amount varies from one course to another. Any refund in fee will be done as per current UGC refund norms only. Affordability is one of the reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Final year students can also apply on a provisional basis, subject to meeting the eligibility criteria at the time of admission. The admission to MCA course will

faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at PES University?
faqs.answer: In PES University, fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. Given below are the cateogy wise refund fee policy of PES University:PESSAT Application fee:Once the transaction has been done successfully on the PES University website, no requests for refund or cancellation will be accepted.Admission Processing Fee:The admission processing fee at PES University is completely non-refundable.Program Course Fee:Any refund here will be done as per current UGC refund norms only.

courses_data.name: PES University BBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: PES University BBAoffers a three-year UG degree. Along with the BBA (General) course, the University also provides courses such as BBA (Business Analytics), BBA (Hospitality & Event Management), BBA (Sports Management), and BBA (Hons). To get admission to the BBA course, students need to qualify for PESSAT followed by an interview.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BBA in PES University?
faqs.answer: Yes, PES University conducts PESSAT for providing admission to BBA course. The university also considers the marks obtained in the qualifying examination for admission. In order to get admission to BBA at PES University, student need to pass Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in the respective subjects as per the minimum eligibility criteria. The final selection is done based on the performance of candidates in the personal interview (PI) round, that is conducted at the university.

Apart from the programe fee, aspirants also need to pay a registration fee of INR 1,150. Candidates can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes.

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in PES University?
faqs.answer: For getting seats in PES University, the student must satisfy eligibility criteria, give the PESSAT entrance exam, and then provide rank. Once students qualify for the entrance exam, they are short-listed on the basis of available seats and rank for counseling. Counseling will provide them with seats. So, proper application is to be followed and documents should reach the University in the time frame.

faqs.question: Is PES University admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, admissions to the UG and PG programmes conducted at PES University are now open. All applicants have to fill their online application form at the university portal and enroll themselves for entrance tests such as PESSAT or any other entrance test valid throughout the country.

faqs.question: Can I join PES University after Class 12?
faqs.answer: If you qualify the eligibility criteria, then you can get admission to PES University after clearing class 12 and apply for the course you are interested in. Most courses would require to have passed class 12 with a good percentage and apprear in the PESSAT entrace exam. After clearing the entrace exam, you should be able to secure a seat for your preferred course.

faqs.question: Is PESSAT compulsory for PES University?
faqs.answer: Almost all courses in PES University can be admitted to if a student qualifies through PESSAT. It is the only entrance exam that the college looks into and includes for eligibility in their courses. However, in such exceptional cases like direct admission allowed for the high achievers, one may be exempted from the PESSAT process. Therefore, candidates have to clear the PESSAT exam with the prescribed minimum cutoff.

placement_data.title: PES University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: PES University has released the 2025 placement data. The overall highest package secured by the students of the batch 2025 stood at INR 68 LPA . Over 350 companies participated during PES University placements 2025 and presented over 1,500 placement offers to the students. The top recruiters of PES University in 2025 include Amazon, Google, KPMG, HP, Deloitte, Cosco, Flipkart, etc.

In addition to offering placement opportunities to the students, the placements wing of the University looks after the training of students on a continuing basis. In 2025, the students received more than 1,250 internship offers from reputed companies like SAP, NVIDIA, Siemens, etc.

description: PES University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

PES University Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 656 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 700 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at PES University. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 656 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 239, while in 2023, it was 575.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

PES University accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering has the lowest cutoff rank of 6056 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 5241, in the General All India quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: PES University Bangalore Infrastructure: Campus Facilities

data: 100 Feet Ring Road, BSK III Stage, Bangalore (Main Campus)
Separate hostels for girls and boys
Library, Cafeteria, Hostel, Sports Complex, Auditorium, Research centres, Medical services, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Faculty have higher education with doctorate degrees, but the teaching is not very good. Most of the students self-study to score well. Infrastructure is 10/10. All the facilities are good, and everything you need will be available. As I am a day scholar, I don't know much about the hostel and mess.

reviews.review_heading: There are a lot of clubs technical and non technical which are worth.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice and has a lot of extracurricular sports and a lot of eating spots. There are separate places for the hackathons to be conducted. There are a lot of auditoriums. There are separate blocks of each branch like B.Tech B.Com BBA etc.

reviews.review_heading: One of the top colleges in Bangalore, with top-notch infrastructure and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The canteen and hostel facilities are really good. This might be the best thing about the university. The libraries are of top-notch quality. They have great basketball courts, badminton courts, and other sports facilities. The food available in the canteen is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the infrastructure, but it can include more extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are quite excellent, including Wi-Fi for all and a specialised library for law. 
The quality of the hostel is also nice, but the food is not so much appreciated in the canteen, and it takes a lot of time to get prepared. 
There are quite a few sports games like football, basketball, badminton, etc. Including the top infrastructure courts for each sport.

reviews.review_heading: Completely worth a one-time investment.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is good, but restricted to one device only, and the internet doesn't come on the campus. Classrooms and faculty are all world-class. I'm a day-scholar, but as per my peeps, hostel food is bad. But the canteen food is top-notch. Sports facilities are also top-notch. Gym (10K for RR campus and 6K for EC campus), both are good.

reviews.review_heading: You will experience every feeling in this college, good placements, and good friends.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers a fine infrastructure with high-speed Wi-Fi and a well-built library to study with all kinds of books. A well-maintained canteen, well-facilitated sports field, and medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: PES: The real reason why to join PES.
reviews.review_text: The campus life, infrastructure, and both indoor and outdoor places are really well-maintained and well-equipped. This is one of the attractions at PES, where we get to see a huge block just for indoor sports and other co-scholastic activities. Here at PES, students get to play sports whenever they want, there are separate fields for different outdoor sports. One of the most attractive being is the cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private university, but the fee is too high.
reviews.review_text: For first-year students, the hostel is not on campus, but from the second year, the hostel is on campus. The Wi-Fi in both the college and the hostel is good. Facilities in the college are also good. The food is of good quality and quantity. Everything mentioned above is available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Worthy for course but not for money.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good and aesthetically pleasing. To sit and study we have quite big libraries and Wi-Fi is available but sometimes it is a trouble to connect with them. Moreover, we have a boys hostel inside the college campus and a girl's hostel outside the campus which is contact based and it is taken up by a living space company, for girls hostel which includes food and snacks for the hostellers.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with infrastructure and faculty, bit disappoint and concerned about placements.
reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, our college has the best facilities. They provide us all we need, including a study area. We have four different libraries, including one exclusively for the law department, which has a collection of even rare books. There is also a three-storied central library and an international-level moot court hall. We have courts for basketball, volleyball, badminton, and tennis, with a highly structured gym facility for students. There are six canteens that provide clean foo...

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements, Great Exposure, but Super Difficult Exams.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty much okayish, not so good I would say because I have seen my friends complaining about the hostel food and all, and also they are building a new hostel now. Wi-Fi, sports, and games are always there, but unfortunately, I am not in the hostel, so I don't know what exactly is happening there.

reviews.review_heading: Not what I expected it to be.
reviews.review_text: The college provided good classroom and lab facilities. The hostel rooms are decent compared to other hostels. There are four canteens on the campus, and the quality of the food is good. The campus is clean and huge. We have small stalls for snacks and stationery inside the campus.

reviews.review_heading: PES University at Bangalore.
reviews.review_text: PES University is a wide university including a lot of courses. Specialized lecturers are appointed for all the courses. A higher area is allocated for parking and sports courts. The library, with an extensive collection of books by various authors, was arranged in the college library.

reviews.review_heading: Slightly expensive for studies.
reviews.review_text: Students from different places come here to study, but there is no partiality or discrimination among them. The main aim of the college is to showcase the talents and skills of the students and help them succeed in their careers. But I'm not okay with the hostel food, so I would give it four stars.

reviews.review_heading: NammaPesu: An Honest Take.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good in our college. We have ample space for parking, playing cricket, football, and pretty much every outdoor sport. We also have 3 cafeterias, as well as a hospital upcoming in our campus itself. There is also a dedicated room for yoga, as well as a gym room.

data.description: PES University arranges faculty development programmes and has experienced faculty members. Several worship and seminars are arranged for students and teachers. The university also conducts student exchange programmes and faculty exchange programmes. The faculty at PES University Bangalore are diploma, PhD, and degree holders. The university also invites guest faculty for various lectures and events.

paragraphs: PES Bangalore offers scholarships to postgraduate and undergraduate course students as financial assistance. The below-mentioned table reflects on the PES University Bangalore scholarship details:
Scholarship Name
Details
Rural Scholarships
Free Engineering education is offered to students belonging to rural backgrounds. This scholarship is offered only to a selected number of students.
Corporate Scholarships
Students studying the final year of education are offered scholarships by many corporates based on their merit.
Distinction Awards
Students with an SGPA of 7.75 and above can receive cash prize money.

reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities and they will improve so as good for college.

review_content.Placements: 200 students are allotted in one batch. No package is offered in my course. No companies are recruiting for the MBBS course. Internships are compulsory for every student and are not required by any company. They are available within the college. Every college provides opportunities for students to improve their skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available, such as hostels, classrooms, labs, and the library, but not Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is good, and the college has special infrastructure for every department with good management. The quality improves every year, as the college focuses on good health, good teaching, and good management.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good college at this time.

review_content.Placements: This is a medical college. You find companies here. But yes, you can get employed directly after your MBBS in your college itself and get a hefty salary of Rs 75,000, working as a casualty medical officer. Other options include working as a house officer in the department of your choice with a reduced salary of Rs 45,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: I have opted for hostel rooms. The good infrastructure is good, and there is no disturbance in studies on a sharing basis in 1 room. Maximum 4 students are able to accommodate facilities. There are three hosts for boys at the UG lavatory.

reviews_list.batch_info: BPMT in Radiography - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It's a very good college.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed. The highest salary package was 4 LPA. No companies came here. Recruiters were hospitals. No stipend was provided in paramedical courses.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college had the best machines. The campus was good. All the facilities were available at this college. The library and canteen were good. The taste of the food served in the canteen was too good. There was also a tea stall. Medical facilities were very good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were very helpful, good, and caring. They were qualified. They had good behaviour. There are two exams a year, i.e., one in the summer and one in the winter. Students who fail the winter exams can write the summer exams.

faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi Government Medical College and Hospital, Nagpur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.Sc.Candidate must have passed 10+2 or equivalent qualification from a recognised board.UG DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10+2 with Science stream from a recognised board.PG DiplomaIn order to become eligible for counseling, candidate must have obtained minimum 50 percentile for General category (40 percentile for SC/ST/OBC (including PWD of SC/ST/OBC) and 45 percentile for UR PWD) in NEET PG.MBBSCandidate must have passed in Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology, and English individually and must have obtained mentioned percentage taken together in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Biotechnology. In respect of PwBD candidates as per NMC and DCI Regulations, the minimum marks in the qualifying examination in Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or Botany & Zoology)/Biotechnology taken together shall be 40% instead of 50%. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission (born on or before 31.12.2006) Result awaited candidates can also apply.MDIn order to become eligible for counseling, candidate must have obtained minimum 50 percentile for General category (40 percentile for SC/ST/OBC (including PWD of SC/ST/OBC) and 45 percentile for UR PWD) in NEET PG.MSIn order to become eligible for counseling, candidate must have obtained minimum 50 percentile for General category (40 percentile for SC/ST/OBC (including PWD of SC/ST/OBC) and 45 percentile for UR PWD) in NEET PG.

review_summary.college_name: IGMC Nagpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college with okay campus but good opportunities.

content.Placements: Only 0.2% of people get accepted into government medical college for MBBS. After undergrad, one has to do post-graduation and residency, and then they can practice medicine. They can earn about 9.6 -12 LPA. There are many branches in this course to choose from.
content.Infrastructure: There is a different building for each department. For example, there is an Anatomy building which has the dissection hall, demo rooms, and a museum for Anatomy and Embryology, and there is a lab for Histology. The labs are well-maintained. The hostel is okay, but the food is not so good. The canteen is nice; it has a little variety of food.

individual_reviews.course: BPMT in Laboratory - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college fee, placement, internship and the study.

content.Placements: Overall, 30% of students enrolled in our college. Outside the college, there are various opportunities for students to get placements. We get opportunities in various hospitals, including government sectors. The internship is provided by the college and the stipend we get ranges between INR 8,000 and INR 10,000. The top role offered in my course is laboratory technician. We can open our lab and also become lecturers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice but it needs to improve in various sections. There is no Wi-Fi. The classrooms have smart facilities. The medical facilities are below average, even though it is a government hospital. The canteen is nice, but we don't have any games or sports.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities and they will improve so as good for college.

content.Placements: 200 students are allotted in one batch. No package is offered in my course. No companies are recruiting for the MBBS course. Internships are compulsory for every student and are not required by any company. They are available within the college. Every college provides opportunities for students to improve their skills.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available, such as hostels, classrooms, labs, and the library, but not Wi-Fi. The infrastructure is good, and the college has special infrastructure for every department with good management. The quality improves every year, as the college focuses on good health, good teaching, and good management.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good college at this time.

content.Placements: This is a medical college. You find companies here. But yes, you can get employed directly after your MBBS in your college itself and get a hefty salary of Rs 75,000, working as a casualty medical officer. Other options include working as a house officer in the department of your choice with a reduced salary of Rs 45,000.
content.Infrastructure: I have opted for hostel rooms. The good infrastructure is good, and there is no disturbance in studies on a sharing basis in 1 room. Maximum 4 students are able to accommodate facilities. There are three hosts for boys at the UG lavatory.

individual_reviews.course: BPMT in Radiography - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good college.

content.Placements: About 70% of students were placed. The highest salary package was 4 LPA. No companies came here. Recruiters were hospitals. No stipend was provided in paramedical courses.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had the best machines. The campus was good. All the facilities were available at this college. The library and canteen were good. The taste of the food served in the canteen was too good. There was also a tea stall. Medical facilities were very good.
content.Faculty: Teachers were very helpful, good, and caring. They were qualified. They had good behaviour. There are two exams a year, i.e., one in the summer and one in the winter. Students who fail the winter exams can write the summer exams.

reviews.review_heading: It is good in terms of academics, but the infrastructure needs to improve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fine. The main building is a bit old. We will be getting a new building that is equipped with all the facilities. The building is almost 90% complete. The labs are well maintained. Hostels are also decent and new. Boys have to live in the old hostel for their first year and are then shifted to the new hostel for their second year. The old hostel is not in good condition. Mess is also good and provides good food. We don't have good sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in teaching, campus facility is not that great, facility and infrastructure is decent.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is decent. Some instruments are old but are usable. It's all about using it effectively for understanding concepts. We have well-equipped lab which has decent facilities. There is library with Wi-Fi available with ample amount of books. Hostel facility is good compare to other GMC. First year hostel, is Jawahar hostel which is old but with decent facility. Hostels from second year are very good (New boys hostel). There is 24*7 electricity and water facility. Mess fac...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indira Gandhi Government Medical College and Hospital, Nagpur.
reviews.review_text: Although most of the buildings in this college are new, the hospital is an old standard, and some of the wards are in very break-down condition. The campus area is also not very large and does not boast of any sports or co-curricular activities. Hostels are well built and maintained well.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best government college, with good teachers and courses.
reviews.review_text: It has a good hostel, and water supply is good. Lighting is good. Ventilation is good. Surroundings are clean. The staff wash the floors regularly. The warden is not so helpful in solving the hostel issues, and he doesn't visit anymore. Unauthorised people easily can come in and go out without hesitation, and that's the problem.

reviews.review_heading: There are really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best in Maharashtra. The food served in the mess is average. Sports and games are best available on our college premises. Library services are very good with maximum books. Good food is served daily, which is worth the cost. Hostel and rooms are of better quality.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with the best infrastructure. The only problem is bad roads.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the hostel is excellent and beyond expectations for a government college and an MBBS student. The only problem is currently there is no mess for the boys' hostel and a few buildings are under construction. But it will be completed soon. Otherwise, the campus is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Knowledgeable and skilled faculty with appropriate infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure is good with adequate capacity, spacious rooms, well-equipped bathrooms that are cleaned daily. They have separate area for studying and mess has hygienic and tasty food. The college infrastructure is a bit old but up to the mark. New buildings are being constructed. All departments are spacious, equipped with a big library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a nursery, shaping young brains and creating excellent doctors and good human beings.
reviews.review_text: It provides big library with an e-library and one of the biggest on-campus reading rooms that I have seen. Wi-Fi was enabled, two big lecture halls apart from department-wise teaching rooms were available. Hostel mess, canteen, and snacks area were available. Annual GFC and gathering had a multitude of sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Great facilities and infrastructure, great teachers and great hospital campus.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure, the hostels are well maintained and there is a lot of space. The hostel has reading rooms, a gym, and a mess. The food is decent and the facilities are pretty good. There is a basketball court and a big ground for cricket and football. The labs are good, they have most of the equipment. My favorite part is going to explore the hospital campus, which is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure and education.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel canteen is outdated otherwise hostel facilities are good. Wi-Fi is not made available and classrooms must be modernized. Laboratories are inadequate to hold students. The food quality is average. Sports have become a scarcity, because students do not have proper ground.

reviews_list.review_title: It has really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There is one year of internship in our college. In internships, we work in government hospitals as a doctor and learn about diseases and their curve, which are spread in the human community. After completing the internship, we can practice as a doctor, and then there are no limits.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities are available on campus like lecture halls, practical labs, a demonstration room, a dissection hall, a library, a garden, and a canteen. There is a room to play indoor games like chess, carrom, table tennis, badminton, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Medical College Vadodara is where dreams come true.

review_content.Placements: The MBBS students are compulsorily required to do the internship after the course is completed. The placement for the 1-year internship is given by the college itself. Our college and hospital have the best patient flow, so the students get more exposure to patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, and the college has almost all facilities. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are modern and have all the technology. The library is huge and air-conditioned. The quality of the mess food is average, which can be improved so that we get proper meals. Every sport is available to participate in.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Baroda Medical College, my dream college.

review_content.Placements: Almost all students get jobs after course completion or they do post graduation or start their own private practice. All students have an option to serve as a medical officer employed by the state government. Just after MBBS degree, you can expect 50,000 to 1,00,000 INR per month in the private sector. Medical officer salary is close to 80k/month in Gujarat.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture halls are well-equipped with air conditioning, leathered seats, elevators, projectors, and mics for professors. Hospital setting lacks modern infrastructure but the college campus has all facilities. Library can seat close to 200 students and is open 24*7. Entire campus has good security even during the nighttime.

content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure of the college is nice. The campus is good. There are various departments for the different subjects. description: Baroda Medical College, Baroda cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Baroda Medical College, Baroda NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 26692 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Baroda Medical College, Baroda MBBS cutoff 2025 was 26692 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27158 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Baroda Medical College, Baroda accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Baroda Medical College, Baroda NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 4867 to 75765. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Baroda Medical College, Baroda MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Radio Diagnosis, followed by MD in Bio-Chemistry and MD in Microbiology. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 4867, 58397 and 75765, respectively.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Baroda Medical College, Baroda Gujarat NEET PG cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round. The cutoff was released as opening-closing ranks for MD and MS admission. Candidates seeking admission to top courses such as MD in Anatomy and MD in Physiology must aim to secure up to 146 and 3509 or less for admission. Other than the general category, the cutoff ranks for the same were different and are available in the table below by using the provided filters.

reviews.review_text: The college gives facilities like AC rooms with comfortable sitting arrangements, clean labs, 24/7 library, highly qualified professors, but lack of Wi-Fi, management, hostel, mess, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There are well-furnished buildings in my college that contain AC and all the necessary equipment. There are complete practical classes with all instruments available. The hostel allots 4 girls per room. There is a fridge per floor, and a mess is also available in my hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Baroda Medical College, Baroda.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college buildings are well-furnished. They provide all the required equipment and all surgical instruments. The hostel facilities are good. They provide food and laundry services.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Baroda Medical College, Baroda.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college buildings are well-furnished. They are equipped with air-conditioners. They have all the required equipment. A huge library is available in our college. It contains 4 floors. Our college has reading rooms. They are equipped with air-conditioners. A computer library is available in our college. We have a book issue library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a place that focuses only on academics.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-structured library, which contains two floors of well-furnished reading rooms with a capacity of 200 persons per room. There is a computer library and a book library. Classrooms are big enough to hold students. They have air conditioners.

reviews.review_heading: Reeview of Baroda Medical College, Baroda.
reviews.review_text: There is a fully furnished library with 2 reading rooms. It has a digital library as well as a reading library. There are lecture halls with air conditioning. The hospitals are well ventilated. The hostel provides Wi-Fi facilities. There are sports facilities at our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with aesthetic environment.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure of my college is good. It contains AC classrooms as well as Wi-Fi hostels. It has a fully furnished library, which also has AC.
The library is on four floors, which contain the computer library, the book library, and two reading rooms, which is a good thing.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college, situated in the heart of the city.
reviews.review_text: Some parts of the college are still old but new lecture Halls and new practical building have just started this year. New lecture Hall is having central A. C. with a very good lighting. There is single table and chair for every student to sit in all the lecture halls. The quality of food in mess is not really good. Most students prefer eating out. College premises has a canteen but that is also not good.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of TD Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not offered. Getting a permanent job can be hard sometimes. Still, being a doctor we can have many options for further studies. Many opt for PG or go abroad and some prefer to work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and Wi-Fi are available. The quality of food is good. Sports and games are given importance. Football, cricket, basketball, volleyball, badminton, chess, table tennis, and many more are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are doctors. The curriculum is very relevant and the house surgeon period is an excellent learning curve. The best part of being in a government college, you get a lot of exposure. Pass percentage is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: the college needs to do better in terms of placement

review_content.Placements: The percentage of the student getting placed in our college is 90%. The highest package is 10 Lakhs the lowest package is 5 Lakhs and the average package is 7.5 Lakhs. The top recruiting companies are Apollo, Fortis Max hospitals, and many more companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure that is available for our course are that we have a fully automated classroom with audio and video classroom facilities the quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the food quality in the hostel is not that great enough.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements.

review_content.Placements: It was the most delightful college in the state. Amazon, Wipro, and Tata were top recruiting companies. The highest salary offered was Rs. 100000 per month and the lowest was Rs. 40000 per month. About 90% of students were placed in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels were good and clean. The canteen and dining areas were also very clean. There were good medical facilities. Wi-Fi was available 24X7. Classrooms were modern, with scientific instruments. We had a mini-library. All types of food were served in the canteen. There were two huge playgrounds.

faqs.question: Can I get a call from TD Medical College with a 10000 rank in the NEET?

answer.text: TD Medical College accepts NEET PG scores for admission to MD and MS specialisations. TD Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2024 was closed for further admissions. The cutoff was released for different categories belonging to the All India quota. With the cutoff rank of 1500 in NEET PG, candidate belonging to the General All India category can get admission to almost all the specialisations except MD in General Medicine and MD in Dermatology, Venereology and Leprosy, as per the last round closing ranks. individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements.

content.Placements: It was the most delightful college in the state. Amazon, Wipro, and Tata were top recruiting companies. The highest salary offered was Rs. 100000 per month and the lowest was Rs. 40000 per month. About 90% of students were placed in our course.

faqs.answer: A:    In CHARUSAT, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done except some situation. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction. Given below is the case in which university offers refunds:If transaction is successfull, and candidates didn't get the event ticket, then candidates should contact the university as possible through email on alumni@charusat.ac.inFor events: If event is cancelled by the organizers, then CHARUSAT will not be responsible for any circumstances arised like refunding ticket amount. However, you can directly contact organizers which you can find on event detail page.For Membership: If any discrepancy is found in your details, your life membership would be cancelled without any refund.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee structure for various courses at CHARUSAT?
overview_faqs.answer: CHARUSAT fee is a sum of multiple components such as caution deposit, tuition fee, exam fee, etc. Candidates are required to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Below is CHARUSAT courses and fee:CourseTotal Tuition FeeBTechINR 4- 5.9 lakhMBAINR 2.9 lakhMTechINR 2 lakhBScINR 1.5 - 6.2 lakhBPharmaINR 6.2 lakhNote: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of CHARUSAT?
overview_faqs.answer: In CHARUSAT, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done except some situation. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction. Given below is the case in which university offers refunds:If transaction is successfull, and candidates didn't get the event ticket, then candidates should contact the university as possible through email on alumni@charusat.ac.inFor events: If event is cancelled by the organizers, then CHARUSAT will not be responsible for any circumstances arised like refunding ticket amount. However, you can directly contact organizers which you can find on event detail page.For Membership: If any discrepancy is found in your details, your life membership would be cancelled without any refund.

overview_faqs.question: Is Charotar University of Science and Technology (CHARUSAT) worth the hype?
overview_faqs.answer: CHARUSAT University popular programmes are BSc & BTech. The four year BTech course offers placement assistance to students. The university is visited by top companies for placements such as TCS, Reliance Industries limited, ICICI Bank, and others. Yes, Charotar University of Science and Technology (CHARUSAT) is worth all the hype.

review_summary.college_name: CHARUSAT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at CSPIT has been very positive with supportive faculty and modern facilities.

content.Placements: I am from the computer engineering batch of Sandhu by S Patel Institute of Technology. In our course, around 75 percent of students are placed through campus drive. The highest package offered is about developed, and the package is around 3 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our computer engineering department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with vast resources. Hostel provides good facilities with planned rooms. It has 24X7 medical support, and some nice food. There are also four grounds and indoor game facilities that ensure overall students' development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My experience at CSP Charon set has been very positive with supportive faculty and modern facilities

content.Placements: I am from the computer engineering batch of Sandhu Biosportal Institute of Technology in our course. Around 75 to 80% of students are placed through campus life. The highest package offered is about 12 LPA, the lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the average package is around 5 LPA, some of the top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and several product-based startups.
content.Infrastructure: Our computer engineering department has well-equipped labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a central library with vast resources. The hostel provides good facilities with planet rooms, 24X7 medical support, and resentments food. There are also sports grounds and indoor game facility that ensure development.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty and decent placements.

content.Placements: Our batch of Mechanical Engineering had 75% placements. The highest package was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3.2 LPA, and average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters were Tata, L&T, Maruti, and Mahindra. 60% got internships at Tata, Adani, and ONGC. Roles were Design, Production, Quality, and R&D. Good sometimes.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, modern labs, a CAD/CAM center & library. Hostel has clean rooms, Wi-Fi, a good mess & canteen, medical aid, and sports facilities like gym, cricket, football, badminton, ensuring overall student support. It's great.

Top recruiters were Tata, L&T, Maruti, and Mahindra. 60% got internships at Tata, Adani, and ONGC. Roles were Design, Production, Quality, R&D, and it's great.
