individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Strong placements, supportive faculty members, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: I was part of the computer engineering batch of 2024-2025. Around 85-90% of students are placed. The highest package is 15 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and average is 6 LPA to 7 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Capgemini. About 70% of students got internships at Deloitte, Cognizant, and HCL with roles like software engineer, developer, and analyst.
content.Infrastructure: The department has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a digital library. Hostels are clean and comfortable. Food in the mess/canteen is hygienic, and medical support is available on campus. Students also enjoy sports grounds, indoor games, and a gym for recreation.

admission_overview.college_name: CHARUSAT University Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Process, Fee, Selections

paragraphs: Charotar University of Science and Technology admissionis currently underway for online courses. The university gives a wide range of programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are provided in many fields, such as Science, Technology, Computer Application, Pharmacy, and more. Students seekingCHARUSATadmission must fulfil the eligibility and selection criteria of the desired course. The admission process at university is conducted in both online and offline modes. The university accept students mostly on entrance basis.students can read to know more about courses, eligibility, selection criteria, fees and admission procedure of university.

AtCharotar University of Science and Technology, students can pursue over 80 programmes across different specialisations. Additionally, students can also enrol in online programmes offered by the university. The university offers courses through its associated colleges. To apply for course students need to visit the official website of the university. Students can refer to table below to know aboutCHARUSAT admission 2024 highlights:
CHARUSAT Admission 2024 Highlights
Mode of study
Full time/ Regular mode/ Online
Programmes offered
Admission Status 2024
How to apply
UG courses: INR 1.5 lakh to INR 6.4 lakh
PG courses: INR 90,000 to INR 4.8 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma
Popular programmes
BSc| BTech| MSc| MTech

Charotar University of Science and Technology course admissionis based on entrance exams for most of its courses. Students must fulfil the admission criteria before applying for the desired programme. The university accepts many national and state level exams, such as JEE Main, GUJCET, NEET, etc for shortlisting students. Additionally, the student's marks in the last qualifying exams are also taken into consideration. students can refer to table mentioned below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularCHARUSAT courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

Charotar University of Science and Technology feeis inclusive of various components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, library fees, and more. Some fee components are charged only once, while the remaining need to be paid either yearly or semester wise. Students need to pay the fee to finalise their seats at the university. CHARUSAT fee differs as per course and specialisation selected by students. The fee ranges betweenINR 50,000andINR 6.4 lakh. Students can refer to the following table for coursetowiseCHARUSAT feesand the average package:
Note: This information is sourced from an official source and is subject to change.

Charotar University of Science and Technology seat intakedepends on as per course and specialisation chosen by students. To get a seat students need to fulfil the admission criteria and pay course fee. For some courses, the university assigns a certain amount of seats throughACPC counselling. students can refer to table mentioned below to know aboutCHARUSAT seat intakefor popular programmes:
Note: This information is sourced from an official source and is subject to change.

Charotar University of Science and Technology admissionis a multitostep procedure that involves application, selection, counselling and final admission confirmation. Students applying for the various programmes offered at the institute must fulfil coursetospecific eligibility criteria before applying for the programme. The admission process of the university is conducted through both offline and online modes. Students can follow the steptowiseCHARUSAT admission processgiven below:
lists: Students can visit the official website of the university and register themselves. Registered students need to fill in the application form by providing details, such as name, email ID, phone number, desired course and more. To submit the form students need to pay the application fee.

Students will be selected based on course specific eligibility criteria decided by the university. The university allows students on both merit and an entrance basis depending on course. For programmes, such as BTech, BPharma, MTech, etc, the university accepts national or statetolevel entrance exams (NEET, GUJCET, CMAT). selected students will be called in for counselling.
To confirm their admission, students need to pay the admission fee and go through document verification.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Charotar University of Science & Technology entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: Charotar University of Science & Technology admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The university offers various programmes across several fields and specialisations. For certain courses, the university accepts candidates on an entrance basis. While for admission to the remaining courses is through merit basis. Students can look at the following table to know about theselection criteria for CHARUSAT courses:CoursesSelection CriteriaBScMerit-basedBTechGUJCET| JEE MainMScMerit-basedBPharmaGUJCET| NEETMCACMATBPTMerit-basedMBACAT| CMATMTechGATE| ACPCNote: This information is taken from official source and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in CHARUSAT?
faqs.answer: Charotar University of Science and Technology admissions are either merit or entrance-based. However, the university reserves a certain number of total seats forManagement QuotaandNRI/ NRI Sponsered Quota.The reserved percentage varies according to the course selected by the student. For further detailsm students are advisied to visit the official website of the university and contact the admission help desk. Students can contact the help desk through either mail or phone.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CHARUSAT for BPharm?
faqs.answer: As per CHARUSAT's admission criteria for its BPharm programme, the selection of candidates is based on the scores obtained in the accepted GUJCET entrance exam. Therefore, candidates cannot get direct admission for BPharm. Those who are selected must pay the applicable course fee to confirm their enrollment.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at CHARUSAT for BSc?
faqs.answer: According to the information available on the official website of CHARUSAT, the university invites applications for the BSc programmes based on the last qualifying exam score. This merit-based selection ensure that only capable and worthy candidates are shortlisted for the course. Upon selection, the applicants need to pay the course fee, as applicable, in order to secure their seat.

faqs.answer: If you want to pursue UG degree from Chaotar University of Science and technology, the fees is not too high as comparitively to other private universities. The average tuition fees for UG courses at CHARUSAT is around 3,00,000 per year. However, the fees vary depending on the course. For example, the fees for engineering courses are higher than the fees for Science courses. However charotar University also offer some scholarship and financial scholarships. And if you will avoid the extra expenses so you can definitely afford it.

faqs.question: What are the fee refund rules of CHARUSAT?
faqs.answer: In CHARUSAT, Application, prospectus and registration fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done except some situation. Further, the university refund caution fee deposit. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction. Given below is the case in which university offers refunds: If transaction is successfull, and candidates didn't get the event ticket, then candidates should contact the university as possible through email on alumni@charusat.ac.in For events: If event is cancelled by the organizers, then CHARUSAT will not be responsible for any circumstances arised like refunding ticket amount. However, you can directly contact organizers which you can find on event detail page. For Membership: If any discrepancy is found in your details, your life membership would be cancelled without any refund.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The campus environment is quite good.

review_content.Placements: We have a clinic where we operate oral cancer patients. Many patients enrol their names due to cancer, and we are quite famous for our service. As we have a clinic, we get both the theoretical and practical knowledge. We invite dental doctors for sharing their knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a temple available at the entrance. The whole campus is covered with greenery. Separate space is allotted for parking vehicles of students and faculty. We also have 3 to 4 canteens for refreshments, and you can also have your morning and afternoon food. We also have a clinic to get practical knowledge. In the clinic, they treat patients who are suffering from oral cancer and oral problems.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: There is a higher education fee but it is certainly worth the money spent.

review_content.Placements: No on-campus selection. There are no recruits as of now. But when approached by hospital clinics for work, we can always be top priorities due to our immense learning and clinical skills. Your interest can go into greater depth personally. All very kindly use this place to the fullest.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel and mess are average, but the hospital infrastructure is great and well-equipped. Hospital in-house facilities wide, providing great learning time for students and serving treatment at low cost for patients. Kindly use the place to the fullest. Wi-Fi is available. The library is great.

overview_faqs.question: How is the reputation of Saveetha Dental College, Chennai?
overview_faqs.answer: Saveetha Dental College, Chennai is a premier Institute located in Tamil Nadu. Saveetha Dental College, Chennai was established in the year 1988. Saveetha Dental College, Chennai offers Degree, Diploma and Certificate courses including 5 Undergraduate and 9 Postgraduate courses. These programs are offered in Full Time mode. Saveetha Dental College, Chennai is a premier institute for Master of Dental Surgery, Undergraduate Diploma, Certificate, Bachelor of Science, Bachelor of Dental Surgery courses.Saveetha Dental College, Chennai has gained expertise through its trained and experienced faculty in the fields of Moral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Public Health, Moral Pathology, Endodontics, Moral Medicine & Radiology, Periodontology. Saveetha Dental College, Chennai offered courses that are approved by DCI. Saveetha Dental College, Chennai offered courses with intake of 151 candidates .

overview_faqs.question: Is Saveetha Dental College, Chennai a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Saveetha Dental College (SDC), Chennai, is first on the list of most-cited dentistry institutions in the world, in the QS World University Rankings, and first-ranked in India's National Institutional Ranking Framework for dental schools.Chennai's Saveetha Dental College makes history, scores 18th rank globally. This accomplishment is the first of its kind for an educational institute in India to stand 1st in India, 3rd in Asia and 18th Internationally . Image used for representational purpose only. As per report, the highest package offered to UG and PG students stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 12 LPA. Further, the median package offered to UG and PG students during SDC placements 2022 was INR 3.80 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively. A total of 40 UG students and 29 PG students were placed by top recruiting companies.saveetha Engineering college is not only named for their different courses available but it is also known for its campus placement. Every year the numbers of offered by different

overview_faqs.question: How is the Saveetha Dental College, Chennai for MDS courses?
overview_faqs.answer: The Saveetha Dental College, Chennai, offers Master of Dental Surgery courses in different specializations including MDS in Moral and Maxillofacial Surgery, MDS in Orthodontics, MDS in Conservative Dentistry and Endodontics, MDS in Public Health Dentistry, MDS in Moral Pathology, MDS in Moral Medicine and Radiology, MDS in Prosthodontics, MDS in Periodontology, and MDS in Paedodontics and Preventive Dentistry.The fee for the MDS courses is between INR 9 L to INR 49.5 L (for 3 years).The duration of the courses is 3 years (Full Time).Eligibility Criteria: Candidate must have secured 50 percentile (40 in case of SC/ST/OBC, including PWD of SC/ST/OBC & 45 in case of UR PWD candidates) in NEET- MDS 2023.

review_summary.college_name: Saveetha Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of the college is good, and students can experience practical learning here.

content.Placements: The placements are good in our college, and good companies are visiting our campus for recruitment. Around 35% of the students got placed from college. Students are offered average salary packages. Nearly 65% of the students got the internship from our college. There is a placement cell in the college, and we find it useful for getting placed in a good company.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are many facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, and sports. All the medical instruments that we use are of advanced level. The quality of the food is also good and hygienic. The hostel rooms are maintained well with all the facilities for students.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely good environment.

content.Placements: Placements are really good. There are a lot of opportunities offered by good companies. Students get chance to learn many new things about interviews. High professional companies visit here for on campus interview.
content.Infrastructure: The infra is really awesome and great. The environment is very important to set student’s minds and to concentrate on career. The campus is good with a lot of trees and fresh air. It is peaceful.
content.Faculty: Faculty is great. All of them give their best and are very friendly. They understand the mindset of students just by looking at them. They take classes based on our moods. It was awesome to have such a great staff.

content.Placements: We have a clinic where we operate oral cancer patients. Many patients enrol their names due to cancer, and we are quite famous for our service. As we have a clinic, we get both the theoretical and practical knowledge. We invite dental doctors for sharing their knowledge.

In the clinic, they treat patients who are suffering from oral cancer and oral problems.

admission_overview.college_name: Saveetha Dental College Admission 2025: Cutoffs, Eligibility, Application, Fee & Dates

paragraphs: Saveetha Dental College admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts NEET and NEET MDS scores for admission to specific courses.Saveetha Dental Collegeoffers courses at UG, PG, diploma and certificate levels. BDS is the flagship programme of the college. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

The college offers full-time UG and PG courses in the Dental field. Candidates need to qualify the accepted entrance exam and meet course-specific eligibility requirements for admission. Below areSaveetha Dental College coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Saveetha Dental College admission process includes multiple steps such as registration, selection and fee payment. Aspirants can follow the below steps to get a seat in the college:
STEP 1: Saveetha Dental College Application Process 2025

The mode of application is online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can fill out the application form and pay an application fee to complete the process. Aspirants need to apply for NEET and NEET MDS for BDS and MDS programmes.
STEP 2: Selection

Saveetha Dental College considers NEET scores for admission to the BDS programme. The selection for MDS is based on the NEET MDS score. Besides, admission to all other courses is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Candidates need to appear for entrance exam counselling for BDS and MDS programmes. Selected candidates are offered seats based on their rank. Aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.

paragraphs: As per report, the highest package offered to UG and PG students stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 12 LPA. Further, the median package offered to UG and PG students during SDC placements 2022 was INR 3.80 LPA and INR 6 LPA , respectively. A total of 40 UG students and 29 PG students were placed by top recruiting companies. The placement rate recorded for UG students was 79% and for PG students, it was 93% . Popular recruiters participated during Saveetha Dental College , Chennai placements 2022 include Parkside Dental care, Dr.Ankit Kandelwal Dental Clinic, Chennai , etc.

The highest salary offered was INR 11 LPA for the post of medical consultant and the lowest was INR 3 LPA for the post of ceramist.

individual_reviews.title: Kundnani college of pharmacy.

content.Placements: Almost all students from our college get placed with good packages and good exposure. The highest package offered was 6 lakhs and almost 90% of students got placed. We get jobs in industry and offices, along with those in hospitals too and our college has a good placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Our labs are well-equipped and we don't have separate hostels. The library is well air-conditioned, and the canteen is nice. Along with that, our college has really good exposure for people from all backgrounds. Sports and games are also really good, and the quality of food available is nice.

individual_reviews.course: Ph.D. in Pharmacy - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Perks of being a KMKCPite.

content.Placements: 30 to 40% students get campus placements. The highest package offered is 35 INR per month and the lowest is 25 INR thousand per month. Top recruiting companies are HDFC BANK, ICICI BANK, IQVIA and many more. Internships provided by the college are 100%. Each and every student gets internship. Roles offered are in sales and marketing, quality control department and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good but there is no college campus as such. No playing ground of its own but internal is well maintained and it has a big library. The college has its own auditorium which is air conditioned and best. Good laboratories are there but always lack in chemical ingredients. There is no canteen in the college. There is a games room where students can play carom, chess and table tennis. There is also a quarantine area and medical rooms for students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good in terms of education.

content.Placements: About 55% of students got placed in our college. Top recruiting companies are Mankind, Systopic, Sun Pharmaceuticals, Maclodes Pharma, Glenmark labs, FDC, Pvt Ltd, Cipla Healthcare, etc. Our college organises various programs. Our college provides good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with good facilities. They provide good services to all. They organise various programs related to health care services and the betterment of common people.
content.Faculty: Our faculty members are knowledgeable and well-experienced. They communicate very well. They are polite and helpful. The course is good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I would recommended joining this college.

content.Placements: Around 90-95% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs. 15,000 per month. Top recruiting companies are Med-Care, MedPlus, etc. All students got internships from our college. Top roles offered are pharmacist and medicine representative.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, comfortable classrooms, etc. The food served in our college is good.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality is good. The course curriculum is relevant and helpful and makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 40% in every subject.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with all the facilities and faculty college provide.

content.Placements: Around 90% students get placed. The highest package is something near 5-6 Lacs. There are so many companies likes of Glenmark, Sun Pharma, Cipla, etc. So many students get internship also. College also organised various programmes and webinar for students.
content.Infrastructure: It's 7 floor building which includes 3-4 floor for laboratory then 2 floors for classroom and office. There is small canteen present. Then there is underground library which consists of lots of books. There is not as such ground for college but there is small indoor game room.

admission_overview.title: Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy admission 2025 is open. The college provides undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma courses in the field of Pharmacy. Admission to the programmes is done on the basis of academic merit secured by the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The college also considers valid scores obtained in national or state-level entrance exams. The admission and application process for Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy commences online. The college offers its courses in affiliation with Mumbai University. Students can read the following article to know in-depth about the programmes, eligibility, selection criteria and admission procedure for Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy.

eligibility_selection.title: Principal K.M. Kundnani Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy course admission is subject to the fulfilment of the preset admission criteria. Students are offered BPharma, DPharma, and MPharma programmes at the college. Interested students can visit the official website of the college to apply for the programme of choice by filling out the online application form. For the undergraduate course admissions, students need to pass Class 12 or equivalent from a recognised board. Similarly, for the postgraduate admissions, students need to complete their graduation. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to BPharm at Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy accepts students on an entrance basis for its BPharma programme. However, those seeking to get into the second year of the course may get admitted directly. Although direct admission to the second year is offered, students must still satisfy the admission criteria set by the college. The college may conduct additional selection rounds if it deems it necessary. To know more, visit the official website of the college.

faqs.question: How many seats are offered for BPharm at Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy BPharma seat intakeis 100, with 60 being allocated under the Government-aided scheme and 40 seats being unaided. Eligible students can apply online for the course by fulfilling the admission criteria and going through the admission procedure. It must be noted that this information is taken from official sources and is subject to change. For more information, visit the college's official website.

Students seeking to join the college directly can visit the official website to get the latest information about the same.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: To get admission in Principal K.M. Kundnani College of Pharmacy, students need to complete a multi-step admission process that includes application, selection rounds, counselling, document verification, and admission confirmagtion. Students need to visit the college's website to start the process. As admissions are mainly entrance-based, students need to appear for the state-level exam and participate in the CAP counselling based on which seat allotment is made. Selected students then need to pay the admission fees to secure their spots at the college.

overview_faqs.question: Is MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik is a reputed institute for PG Diploma, After 1th Diploma, D.Pharma, B.Tech, B.Pharma, Pharm.D, M.E./M.Tech, M.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Hospitality & Travel, IT & Software, Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik has a review rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 4.1 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: MET League of Colleges, Bhujbal Knowledge City, Nashik Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Excellent infrastructure with great sports and placement opportunities.

content.Placements: Placements are quite good at MET Bhujabal Knowledge City. Reputed companies like Tata Motors, Netwin, and Winjit visit our campus. Roles offered are usually Software Engineer, Data Science, and Data Analyst. The average package is around 4 LPA-5 LPA. The placement cell is very supportive and helps us with mock interviews.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is massive and very green. The engineering department has a huge 2-floor library, and every department has its own separate library. Security is very strict, no entry is allowed without an ID card, which makes the campus very safe. We have excellent facilities for cricket, basketball, gym, volleyball, chess, and badminton. Canteen food is too good and adorable.

individual_reviews.course: Doctor of Pharmacy (Pharm.D.) - Batch of 2031
individual_reviews.title: It has average placements, not top-tier, and can be considered.

content.Placements: It is the first batch under SPPU that has not passed out yet. So the exact placement can not yet be determined. But after evaluating other courses and branches, a strong estimation can be made. The highest package is 6 LPA-7 LPA, and the average package of 3 LPA-4 LPA can be expected.
content.Infrastructure: From the surface, the college campus is outstanding with good vegetation and biodiversity, with different species of plants and birds. However, the individual building's cleanliness can still be improved. In terms of aesthetics, washrooms can be clearer. Hostel rooms are identical to flats rather than a single room.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My review of this college.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. Our regular recruiters are DE Shaw, Arcesium, Barclays, PWC, RBS, Bank of America, Deloitte, EY, KPMG, Bira, and many others. Various profiles that are offered here include investor relations, Financial Reporting, Management company accounting, Tax, Compliance, Management Reporting, Risk Analytics, etc. The highest package is 28 LPA. The average package is 9 LPA. There are different grounds of interview as well as some group discussions conducted, based on which students get placed into the recruitment with the package offering. Almost 70 percent of students get placed every year. There is also a separate placement cell.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Academics and industry readiness at MET BKC. A balanced perspective.

content.Placements: At MET BKC Institute of Technology, almost all students get interview opportunities, but less than 10% crack them. The highest package is around 2-3 LPA, and while placements are limited, students can improve their chances through strong skills and off-campus applications. Nearly all students secure internships, which help in gaining experience, though job roles vary. To boost employability, students should focus on DSA, backed technologies Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and interview preparation. With the right skills and projects, better opportunities can be secured beyond campus placements.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has a good campus and placements.

content.Placements: The MET college offers a decent placement in Nashik city compared to other colleges. The college tries its best to provide companies and give students placements. Top recruiters are Wipro, Infosys, etc. The top salary package offered is 21 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the best infrastructure and campus in Nashik compared to other colleges. The campus is well-maintainedd and clean every day. The college has also its hostel and canteen. The hostel is outside of campus. The college is good in all aspects.

The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 12,000 - 4,22,908. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 107432 and 442425 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 107432, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 158040.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 107432.

MET Bhujbal Knowledge City MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 91.45. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 89.45 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

MET Bhujbal Knowledge City MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025 has been released for all rounds and categories for students belonging to the All India and Home State quota. According to the MAH MCA CET Cutoff 2025, the cutoff for MCA course admission ranged from 80.54 to 89.13 for the candidates belonging to the General AI category.

As per the MCA Cutoff 2025 for the General category candidates under the Home State quota, the cutoff in the last round of admission was 89.13, whereas, in 2024, admissions were closed at a percentile of 71.52, and in 2023, the last round cutoff was 70.68. This pattern over the years suggests that the competition for MCA admission has increased over the past 3 years. reviews.review_heading: Excellent infrastructure with great sports and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is massive and very green. The engineering department has a huge 2-floor library, and every department has its own separate library. Security is very strict, no entry is allowed without an ID card, which makes the campus very safe. We have excellent facilities for cricket, basketball, gym, volleyball, chess, and badminton. Canteen food is too good and adorable.

reviews.review_heading: It has average placements, not top-tier, and can be considered.
reviews.review_text: From the surface, the college campus is outstanding with good vegetation and biodiversity, with different species of plants and birds. However, the individual building's cleanliness can still be improved. In terms of aesthetics, washrooms can be clearer. Hostel rooms are identical to flats rather than a single room.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a lot of facilities including public to private facilities for both males and females. The dorms and washrooms are maintained and kept clean here. They also provide laundry service, medical services, and safety. The quality of food is healthy and they serve it 4 times a day in a specific time slot. The hostel facilities along with the fees are highly cost-effective and convenient as well.

reviews.review_heading: Academics and industry readiness at MET BKC. A balanced perspective.
reviews.review_text: All the basic facilities are available, and the library is the best part of our college. We have a sports room and a gym. We also have a canteen that offers a variety of foods, and it is good.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a good campus and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has the best infrastructure and campus in Nashik compared to other colleges. The campus is well-maintainedd and clean every day. The college has also its hostel and canteen. The hostel is outside of campus. The college is good in all aspects.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to take admission in Nashik.
reviews.review_text: The college has a big library, sports room, computer labs, clean washrooms, digital boards in the classroom, good benches, greenery, and a well-equipped canteen. Hostels are quite good. The food is decent. We have a canteen and sports rooms. The hostel has good security so parents don't have to worry about their children.

reviews.review_heading: The college is excellent. I recommended others to get an admission.

college_info.intro:
KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy offers courses at the UG, PG, and doctoral levels in the field of Physiotherapy. The popular programmes at KJSCP Mumbai include BPT and MPT. The Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) program is offered for a duration of 4.5 years and is structured into 8 semesters. In contrast, the Master of Physiotherapy (MPT) program spans 2 years and is divided into 4 semesters.
MPT is available in a number of specialisations that include Musculoskeletal Sciences, Neurosciences, Cardiovascular and Respiratory, Community Physiotherapy, etc. Candidates can check more about the KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy popular programmes in the table below:

The colleges offers MPT in various specialisations such as Community Physiotherapy,Cardiovascular and Respiratory Physiotherapy, Neuro Physiotherapy andMusculoskeletal Physiotherapy. Aspirants with BPT degree can apply for preferred MPT specialisation.

faqs.question: What are the fees structures for MPT programmes at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy MPT isINR 3.7 lakh. In addition, the total fee may include other components as well, such as security deposit, etc.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college. Besides, aspirants also need to pay registration fee in the start to apply for a course.

faqs.question: Which are the MPT specialisations offered at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy offers two-year MPT programme divided into four semesters. This PG level course is offered across different specialisations. The colleges offers MPT in below specialisations:Community PhysiotherapyCardiovascular and Respiratory PhysiotherapyNeuro PhysiotherapyMusculoskeletal Physiotherapy

faqs.question: In which categories is seat bifurcation done for MPT in KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy allot seats under two categories:state quota and institute quota. The seat allotment for the MPT courses is done based on merit in PGP-CET. There are a total of24 seatsfor the MPT programmes. Below table showcases a specialisation-wise seat bifurcation:CoursesSeatsMPT in Musculoskeletal Sciences9MPT in Cardiovascular and Respiratory6MPT in Neurosciences6Master in Community Physiotherapy3NOTE:The aforementioned seat count is as per the official website/sanction

faqs.question: What is the selection process for BPT?
faqs.answer: The Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) course at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy is typically selected through an admission test, followed by counseling. Some of the prominent entry examinations for the BPT course are NEET-UG, AIIMS, and JIPMER. Eligibility requirements normally include finishing 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology as obligatory courses and obtaining a minimum aggregate of 50% on the 10+2 examination. The college provides 100 places for the BPT course.

faqs.question: Does KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy accept NEET score?
faqs.answer: Yes, KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy accepts NEET score for admission to BPT programme. For all other courses, NEET is not required for admission. Besides, candiadates also need to pass Class 12 examination of Maharashtra Higher Secondary School Board or equivalent with English, Physics, Chemistry and Biology (Botany/ Zoology) subjects to get admission in BPT programme.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy accepts NEET score for admission to BPT programme. For MPT, the college considers results of Common Entrance Test, PGP-CET examination conducted by State Government. Candidates applying for PhD programme at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy need to qualify PET examination conducted by Maharashtra University of Health Sciences (MUHS).

faqs.question: Can I get into KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy with 70% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy has not specified the minimum aggregate required to get admission. However, aspirants need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for BPT programme. 70% is a decent score and aspirants with this score in Class 12 can get admission provided they also qualify NEET. Aspirants fulfiling both eligibility and selection requirement are eligible for admission at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPT at KJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy?
faqs.answer: For admission to BPT course, the course aspirants should have passed Class 12 from a recognised board. The applications of the eligible students are considered valid and accepted by the college. At the time of form filling and admission, candidates must hold the relevant documents (copies/original).Aspirants can check below theKJ Somaiya College of Physiotherapy BPT eligibility criteria:CourseCommon EligibilityBPTClass 12 examination of Maharashtra Higher Secondary School Board or equivalent with English,Physics, Chemistry and Biology (Botany/ Zoology) subjects

college_info.intro:
Dibrugarh University has various faculty of studies including the Faculty of Commerce & Management Studies, the Faculty of Science & Engineering and the Faculty of Education. Dibrugarh University courses are offered at UG, PG, and PhD levels across various specialisations, such as Philosophy, Sociology, Law, Journalism and Management studies.
The BTech programme is one of the most popular courses at the University. Dibrugarh University Engineering stream is offered through the BTech programme in several specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Petroleum Engineering. The BTech programme offered at the University typically spans 8 semesters.
Dibrugarh University Assam is also known for offering an MBA programme in both part-time and full-time modes. The full-time MBA programme offers dual specialisation options to students in areas such as Marketing, Finance, HRM, Event Management etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes,  Dibrugarh University conducts the DUPGET exam for admission to the MA course. This exam is questions related to the course and is conducted for admission to all the PG courses.
faqs.question: Does Dibrugarh University have any entrance exam for admission to MA?

faqs.answer: A:    Dibrugarh University admission to MA is based DUPGET entrance examination. The exam consists of objective-type questions, segregated into two sections - General Knowledge and English Language, and subject-specific questions based on the chosen course. A merit list of successful candidates is published after the exam.
faqs.question: Does Dibrugarh University have any entrance exam for admission to the MA programme?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates must have a minimum overall score of 50% in their undergraduate or postgraduate degree in the appropriate topic from a recognised university in addition to receiving at least 50% marks in their honours/major subject in order to be eligible for the B.Ed programme at Dibrugarh University. Even if an applicant fared well on the Common Admission Exam, they will not be admitted if they do not fulfil this requirement (CET). Hence, before applying, candidates should carefully read and comprehend the qualifying conditions.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.

review_content.Placements: Best college I have studied since 2021 higher secondary, and I can say that the college is awesome and also get A grade on NAAC. Students get an internship through the college in their respective courses. They go to an area given by their teacher, and in that they collect a certificate.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students opt for a Masters and further Ph.D. in their respective fields. We have a Masters in Life Science here. A lot of the students choose teaching careers by taking the exams and all. Few go for other careers, like research, and others. You do not get direct placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

review_content.Placements: 55% students placed. The highest package is 22 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average is 10 to 12 LPA. Oil and Natural Gas Corporation, Indian Oil Corporation Limited, and Numaligarh Refinery Limited recruited. Roles offered are Drilling engineer, Production engineer, and Reservoir engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: On campus hostel accommodation for both boys & girls, with wardens and support staff. The common university library is accessible, it serves students, faculty and research scholars. It includes course books, reference materials, journals, etc. Several canteens & one cafeteria. A hygienic, modern double-storied cafeteria is located within the institute campus. Also, university-level canteens are shared. Food for students and staff. Wi-Fi & LAN connectivity are available. Well-furnished classrooms with teaching aids, projectors, etc. Some smart classrooms are in recent buildings. Engineering workshop facilities are available.

review_summary.college_name: Dibrugarh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) in Political Science - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Dibrugarh University: Campus and facilities.

content.Placements: I won’t go by percentage, but only 60 students get selected for the university in the particular course which I’m pursuing. Everyone has the same package, there is no highest or lowest package. Everything is good in this university, so the students who wish to come here and explore can come to the university for their higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities here are the green campus, quiet environment, free Wi-Fi for hostelers, hostel facilities, bicycle facilities to roam the university campus, library, park, museums, labs, medical facilities and many more. So the students who wish to come here could come and enjoy the university facilities and their courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dibrugarh University for engineering is good.

content.Placements: In mechanical branch the placement percentage is 70 to 80 percent. Most of the students get jobs in PSUs like OIL NRL Wipro Infosys TATA, JCB etc. The highest package is about 18LPA and the lowest is about 4 to 5LPA. Placement record is average here. OIL recurring is a lot in 2019.
content.Infrastructure: Library and labs are fine, not bad. Library is air conditioned. Classrooms are big and can accommodate 60 to 70 students. Hostels are average. Food there is also average. Medical facilities are also much better there. They do their work on time only.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Education - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.

content.Placements: Best college I have studied since 2021 higher secondary, and I can say that the college is awesome and also get A grade on NAAC. Students get an internship through the college in their respective courses. They go to an area given by their teacher, and in that they collect a certificate.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.

content.Placements: Most of the students opt for a Masters and further Ph.D. in their respective fields. We have a Masters in Life Science here. A lot of the students choose teaching careers by taking the exams and all. Few go for other careers, like research, and others. You do not get direct placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

admission_overview.college_name: Dibrugarh University Course Admissions 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Dibrugarh University offers admission on the basis ofmeritandentrance examscores. The university offers courses in streams like Commerce, Engineering, Social Science, etc. These courses are offered at the undergraduate, post graduate, and doctoral level. It has its own entrance exams likeDUPGET, DURAT, BED CET that are conducted for courses like MA, PhD, and BEd, respectively. Further, the Dibrugarh University accepts entrance exams likeCAT/MAT/CMATandGATE.

Dibrugarh University admissionto courses is either entrance-based or merit-based. The University offers a variety of UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes in the streams ofHumanities & Social Sciences,Science,Commerce,Engineering,Teaching & EducationandMedical & Health Sciences.Dibrugarh Universityoffers most of the UG courses via its affiliated colleges, where admission is merit-based. The university offers PG courses through more than 10 departments and centres of the university. Admission to these courses is done by the university's in-house entrance exams such asDUPGET,DURAT, B.ED CET for MA, PhD, and B.Ed, respectively.For courses such as MBA and MTech, the university accepts valid scores ofCAT/MAT/CMATandGATE, respectively.

Admission to allDibrugarh University courses(UG, PG, diploma and others) is both merit and entrance-based. Eligible candidates can register online by visiting the official website of the university and its affiliated colleges as per the opted courses. The following table mentions the eligibility, selection & fee for some of thepopular UG, PG and doctoral-level programmes:
Popular Courses
Eligibility &
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 45% aggregate
UG or PG degree with 50% aggregate
Graduation with minimum 50% aggregate
Graduate with 50% aggregate
CAT/MAT/CMAT
Check out more details in the below video:

Dibrugarh University course feesinclude various components such as admission fees, caution deposits, tuition fees, etc. Some of these components, such as the security fee are one-time chargeable. Other components could be refundable, non-refundable, to be paid semester-wise or annually. Candidates seeking admission toDibrugarh University coursescan check out the below table forDU course feealong with the total seats.:
TheDibrugarh University seat intakementioned in the table above includes the seat intake in all affiliated colleges and course specialisations.
Note:The fees and seats mentioned above are taken from official sources/ sanctioning bodies and are subject to change.

Dibrugarh University admission processfor all courses is conductedonlineon its official website. Interested candidates must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and appear for the selection process, determined by the University. Eligible candidates have to begin their admission process by filling out the Dibrugarh University application form before the deadline. Aspirants canrefer to the below steps to complete the Dibrugarh University admission process:
Step 1: Dibrugarh University Application process
TheDU application formsare released online on the university's official website. Candidates must fill out the application form very carefully and pay the required application fee before the deadline.
Step 2: Dibrugarh University Selection Process

The admission criteria for DU courses are bothmerit-based and entrance-based. For admission to entrance-based courses, candidates need to appear for the relevant entrance exam. DU accepts various national-level entrance exam scores to shortlist candidates for final admission.
For admission to merit-based courses,Dibrugarh Univeristyshortlists candidates based on their scores in the qualifying exam.
Step 3: Dibrugarh University Admission Confirmation

After all the selection rounds are over. DU releases a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission confirmation fee and appear for the document verification process to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: What is the placement at Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: The University has not released the 2024 placement report or brochure. However, the 2023 placement details are out in the NIRF report 2024. A total of 11 BPharma and 18 MPharma students were placed during the 2023 drive. All the important details related to Dibrugarh University placements 2023 are mentioned below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (BPharma) 36 Students placed (BPharma) 11 Median package (BPharma) INR 3 LPA Total students (MPharma) 23 Students placed (MPharma) 18 Median package (MPharma) INR 4 LPA NOTE: The above placement statistics are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered in Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: The Dibrugarh University the highest package has not been released as of now. However, the median package for Pharmacy courses is out in the NIRF report 2024. The highest median package in 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and was offered to MPharma students. The table below depicts the placement package for 2023: Course Median Package (2023) BPharma INR 3 LPA MPharma INR 4 LPA

faqs.question: What is the placement rate at Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: The table below depicts the UG and PG placement rate data for Pharmacy courses: Course Placement Rate (2021) Placement Rate (2022) Placement Rate (2023) BPharma 52% 63% 31% MPharma 79% 84% 78% NOTE: The above placement rate is calculated from the details given in the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after pursuing BA at Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the career opportunities for BA graduates of Dibrugarh University extend across both private as well as the government sector. Pursuing a BA at Dibrugarh University makes candidates eligible to appear for different government exams leading to various jobs in the government sector. The following table presents some popular government job profiles for a BA graduate of the university: Government Job Profiles for BA Graduates Average Salary (in INR) IAS 30 lakh IPS 27 lakh IFS 27 lakh Bank officer 18 lakh Research Associate 4.6 lakh Civil Defense Services 14 lakh Indian Airforce 8.5 lakh Bank PO 6.8 lakh

faqs.question: What is the fee for BBA at Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: Dibrugarh University BBA is a 3 year, UG level course offered on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12 and qualify previous examination. The tuition fee is between INR 60K - INR 1.7 Lakh.

faqs.question: What is the fee for Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: Dibrugarh University offers courses in UG, PG and Doctoral levels in distance and full-time mode. The University offers courses such as BTech, BEd, MA, MBA and many more with duration varying from 1 year to 5 years. Dibrugarh University Assam fee structure includes courses with tuition fees ranging from INR 1K to INR 6.25 Lakh.

faqs.question: What is the fees for the MBA course at Dibrugarh University?
faqs.answer: The fee at Dibrugarh University for MBA falls between INR 33 K and INR 3.5 lakh. Candidates must pay the fees via any of the payment modes after the selection process is over.

description: Dibrugarh University cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Dibrugarh University offers admission to the B.Pharma course through NEET UG scores. As per Dibrugarh University cutoff 2023 for the Round 2 seat allotment results, the closing rank stood at 308515 for the B.Pharma course for the General AI category candidates. Similarly for the OBC AI category candidates, the closing rank the similar at 308515. Candidates seeking admission to the B.Pharma course must have valid NEET UG scores to be eligible counselling round.

Dibrugarh University accepts NEET PG scores to offer MD and MS courses to All India category candidates. The NEET PG Counselling 2022 was concluded with Stray Vacancy Round Seat Allotment for Dibrugarh University MBBS admission 2022. The last-round cutoff for MD in Radiotherapy at Dibrugarh University stood at 23498 for General AI category candidates. Tabulated below are the NEET PG 2022 closing ranks for the university, along with 2020 cutoffs, to get clarity on past year trends:

NEET PG Counselling was concluded in five rounds. The MCC releases counselling results for various categories, including Open, OBC, ST, SC and EWS. Candidates can check the round-wise consolidated lists for Maulana Azad Medical College MD and MS courses for the years 2022 and 2021 in the table below:

Dibrugarh University admission to the B.Pharma course is based on TJEE scores. Candidates seeking admission to the aforementioned course must have valid TJEE scores to be eligible for counselling rounds. Considering the General AI category cutoffs, the last round for the B.Pharm course was 3445. For more category-wise Dibrugarh University cutoff 2022, refer to the table below:

The Arunachal Pradesh NEET cutoff for the B.Pharma course has been released by the Dibrugarh University for All India and Home State categories in 2022. Considering the Dibrugarh University cutoff 2022, the last round stood at 243650 for the General Home State category candidates. highlights.description: One of India’s top schools is Dibrugarh University. Numerous national ranking agencies have continuously recognised it as one of the best institutes. According to the NIRF Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #53 rank in the Pharmacy category, and #30 under State Public University. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around Dibrugarh University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 6th Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Assam In 2025
2nd Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Assam In 2025

nirf.description:
Based on the rankings from NIRF, Dibrugarh University outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the NIRF ranking system. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 50 ranks to #151 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'University' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Dibrugarh University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 10 ranks to #53 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
In the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have descended when compared with previous year's ranking. In 2025, Dibrugarh University fell 2 ranks to #30 rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.

hostel_campus.college_name: Dibrugarh University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are total 14 hostels altogether, 7 for boys and 7 for girls. The University is currently providing hostel accommodation to the deserving meritorious students. Adequate care is taken to provide all necessary facilities to the boarders.

library.description: The Library has a collection of 194340 books (on display at the stack section), 143 current periodicals, 22685 bound journals, 21 regional and national newspapers and 10000+ e-journals which include textbooks and reference books. The LNB Library possesses some government publications like Census Data, UN Journals, Commonwealth reports and NSS reports.

reviews.review_heading: Dibrugarh University: Campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are the green campus, quiet environment, free Wi-Fi for hostelers, hostel facilities, bicycle facilities to roam the university campus, library, park, museums, labs, medical facilities and many more. So the students who wish to come here could come and enjoy the university facilities and their courses.

reviews.review_heading: Dibrugarh University for engineering is good.
reviews.review_text: Library and labs are fine, not bad. Library is air conditioned. Classrooms are big and can accommodate 60 to 70 students. Hostels are average. Food there is also average. Medical facilities are also much better there. They do their work on time only.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Jorhat Kendriya MahavidyalayaReviewed on 6 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Jorhat Kendriya Mahavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and many more. The hostel in campus only, and they get everything in the college including canteen, rest room, gym, and more to play for mind relaxation. We have medical facilities nearby. Everything is next door.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by D.C.B. Girls CollegeReviewed on 24 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, value for the money, and everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is amazing with lots of benches and a natural pond in the centre. The building is very close to nature, and the departments and classrooms are airy and good. We have an auditorium and a seminar hall for meetings and stuff. Hostel life is good too, but it's too strict, but you can always choose PG.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.
reviews.review_text: On campus hostel accommodation for both boys & girls, with wardens and support staff. The common university library is accessible, it serves students, faculty and research scholars. It includes course books, reference materials, journals, etc. Several canteens & one cafeteria. A hygienic, modern double-storied cafeteria is located within the institute campus. Also, university-level canteens are shared. Food for students and staff. Wi-Fi & LAN connectivity are available. Well-furnished classrooms...

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department were very good. There are digital classrooms, a big library, labs, and also Wi-Fi connection available in our department as well as the college. The food is also good and hygienic. Don't know much about the hostel, but the canteen is good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sonari CollegeReviewed on 6 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I really like my college. It has good infrastructure facilities etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for our course was quite good. Classrooms were well maintained with projectors air conditioning and comfortable seating. The college provided Wi-Fi computer labs and a central library with a wide range of books and digital resources. Hostel facilities were decent, with spacious rooms 24/7 WiFi laundry services, and common rooms.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tinsukia CollegeReviewed on 31 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good. The college has digital classrooms as well. Hostel quality is also very good, including food and other facilities. Medical facilities are also provided. The canteen is good and clean. Wi-Fi works very well. The library is very big and good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dibru CollegeReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college environment, which has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our college are good and among the best in our locality. We have smart classrooms and a neat and clean environment. Labs are well-maintained and in good condition. The college library has a large collection of books and notes.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Dibru CollegeReviewed on 27 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: I am happy because of the teachers, but disappointed by the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Buildings are large, and the campus is big with department wise classrooms. The auditorium is old, and the chairs are comfortable. The library has a range of books. The canteen has a variety of food. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sonari CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: 1 quality education- 2 good facilities support.
reviews.review_text: Department has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms, a strong library collection (especially in political Science and international relations), computer facilities, and campus Wi-Fi. Hostel facilities were decent, with regular water and electricity supply. Mess food was average but hygienic, and the canteen offered affordable meals. Medical facilities were available on campus, and there were adequate opportunities for sports, cultural activities, and debates.

reviews.review_heading: Opt for B.Tech in ECE only if you are there to have a great college life.
reviews.review_text: I would say the infrastructure was better than most things there, since it was a university. There were various other departments. There was a new central library with three floors but the electronics lab facilities did not match the ones at IITs or tier 1 national colleges, not even close. Hostels seemed reasonable, and the college infrastructure was better than AEC, JEC, and other state government colleges. Giving you a good feel when you are still inside the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Assam Medical CollegeReviewed on 12 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading:
Good placements in 2024
Really good infrastructure clean and hygience area 
Facilities excellent .
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious with modern infrastructure. Classrooms are large, well-ventilated, and equipped with audio-visual aids. Laboratories are well-equipped for practical classes. Hostels are sizable, clean, and well-maintained with separate accommodation for boys and girls. The hostels come with 24-hour electricity, running water, and CCTV security. Mess food is considered average, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options and a monthly cost of around Rs. 1,500- Rs. 2,000. The college ca...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by North Eastern Regional Institute of ManagementReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best law college in Guwahati.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course were satisfactory. Wi-Fi was properly maintained. A huge collection of books was available in the library. Hostel quality was also good. Food was acceptable. Limited medical facility. Some sports were present, like badminton.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by D.H.S.K. Commerce CollegeReviewed on 6 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, everything is good. Faculty members are often helpful. Infrastructure is now improving.
reviews.review_text: New labs are being constructed, and library is well-established and cleaned. Wi-Fi is there but students get no access to it. Hostels are okay, canteen is a bit too expensive and uses too much oil. Sports and games are well-established and organised.

reviews_list.review_title: M.B.B.S. student review for GSVM.

review_content.Placements: My college doesn't offer placements. You have to take the NEET PG exam to practice. There are 250 students in every batch, and all have to take professional exams every year to pass, and finally NEET PG after the completion of the course. Students are provided with an internship of Rs.12,000 after four and a half years.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a large campus area in the college with a small cafeteria. Hostel is available at a cost of Rs.1200 with a mess fee of Rs.2,800 per month. Hostels are not that good because of the lack of cleanliness, hygienic drinking water facilities, and poor sanitation.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members. Best infrastructure in the entire state.

review_content.Placements: Almost every student got placed on this course done by this particular college. The lowest package starts from Rs 95,000 per month and goes up to lakhs of money according to the branch you picked and company you joined. You can get government and private jobs as you wish. Government itself gives you 1.5 years of internships along with a stipend after completing the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very excellent. It is one of the best reasons for me to select this college because of the campus infrastructure and hostels. The departments, laboratories, and hospitals associated with it, every building is vastly furnished and well architect. Hostels are extremely good with large rooms and proper grounds for sports like badminton, football, cricket, basketball, table tennis, and every sport you can think of.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of G.S.V.M. Medical College.

review_content.Placements: Everyone enrolled in a course like MBBS gets a good opportunity to ensure a very good job. The individual is guaranteed to serve a 2-year rural bond and may undergo a three-year residence program. Individuals can work as government medical officers or may sustain self-practice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Being an old college it doesn't have e a modern infrastructure but it has the old aesthetic vibes. A very huge campus, lush green grounds, and well-constructed roads. All essential labs and libraries also have a well-established associated LLR hospital with it.

faqs.answer: G.S.V.M. Medical College is a reputed institute for Certificate, DM, M.Ch., PG Diploma, MD, MS, MBBS. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. G.S.V.M. Medical College has a review rating of 4.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.8 on campuslife, 4.6 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.1 on Infrastructure.
faqs.question: Q: Is G.S.V.M. Medical College a good college/Institute?

faqs.answer: G.S.V.M. Medical College is situated at Kanpur, a centurial academic setup regarded as one of the prominent medical institutes in the country. It is affiliated to Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Awadh University and offers various courses including MBBS/BDS and several postgraduate courses in the field of medicine. The college is popular for its qualified and reputed faculty and elaborate curriculum. Its laboratories are equipped well for the practical training of students. The associated hospitals cater to the needs of students for providing them with proper clinical skills. The placement record also is fair and spotless, and usually the final-year students are able to achieve placements in any healthcare sector. Conclusion: G.S.V.M. Medical College is a good option for medical aspirants with quality education and growth avenues.
faqs.question: Q: Is G.S.V.M. Medical College good?

faqs.answer: The cutoff trend for MBBS at G.S.V.M. Medical College has been decreasing in the recent years. In 2022, the closing rank for MBBS under general category for all India quota was 7540. In 2023, it decreased to 7063. Likewise, the cut off ranks have changed from 11825 to 7106 for OBC 79764 to 62670 for SC 130616 to 91432 for ST 12863 to 8583 for EWS. This trend is likely to continue in the coming years, as the demand for engineering education in India continues to grow. faqs.question: Is G.S.V.M. Medical College a good college/Institute?

answer.text: G.S.V.M. Medical College is situated at Kanpur, a centurial academic setup regarded as one of the prominent medical institutes in the country. It is affiliated to Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Awadh University and offers various courses including MBBS/BDS and several postgraduate courses in the field of medicine. The college is popular for its qualified and reputed faculty and elaborate curriculum. Its laboratories are equipped well for the practical training of students. The placement record also is fair and spotless, and usually the final-year students are able to achieve placements in any healthcare sector. Conclusion: G.S.V.M. Medical College is a good option for medical aspirants with quality education and growth avenues.

faqs.question: Can I get GVSM with 15000 rank?

Medical College.

review_summary.college_name: G.S.V.M. Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Anaesthesia - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Very good placements and college.

content.Placements: 95% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was offered in this course. The highest companies were offered. Top roles provided by this college were too good. It was very best college for medical.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were too good at this college. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library were too good. Our college had very good atmosphere. Quality of hostel and quality of food were too good in mess. Washrooms were very clean. Rooms, canteen, medical, sports, and games facilities were also provided.

individual_reviews.course: Certificate in Lab Technician Training - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good place to study and make career in life.

content.Placements: 25% of students got placed from my course. The lowest package is Rs. 20,000 per month and the highest is Rs. 90,000 per month. Not companies but government jobs are offered. Internships are not available in my course. MRI technician, lab technician, and senior radiographer for rolling are roles offered.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is available in my college for my course as well. The food in my hostel is much better than in others. Here, it is more comfortable. Things to survive as a student are provided, and the staff of the mess are very kind and polite. The facilities of my college hostel are very good, everything is fine, either the building and built-in facilities like light, room facilities, bathroom, etc.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: M.B.B.S. student review for GSVM.

content.Placements: My college doesn't offer placements. You have to take the NEET PG exam to practice. There are 250 students in every batch, and all have to take professional exams every year to pass, and finally NEET PG after the completion of the course. Students are provided with an internship of Rs.12,000 after four and a half years.
content.Infrastructure: There is a large campus area in the college with a small cafeteria. Hostel is available at a cost of Rs.1200 with a mess fee of Rs.2,800 per month. Hostels are not that good because of the lack of cleanliness, hygienic drinking water facilities, and poor sanitation.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty members. Best infrastructure in the entire state.

content.Placements: Almost every student got placed on this course done by this particular college. The lowest package starts from Rs 95,000 per month and goes up to lakhs of money according to the branch you picked and company you joined. You can get government and private jobs as you wish. Government itself gives you 1.5 years of internships along with a stipend after completing the course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very excellent. It is one of the best reasons for me to select this college because of the campus infrastructure and hostels. The departments, laboratories, and hospitals associated with it, every building is vastly furnished and well architect. Hostels are extremely good with large rooms and proper grounds for sports like badminton, football, cricket, basketball, table tennis, and every sport you can think of.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of G.S.V.M. Medical College.

content.Placements: Everyone enrolled in a course like MBBS gets a good opportunity to ensure a very good job. The individual is guaranteed to serve a 2-year rural bond and may undergo a three-year residence program. Individuals can work as government medical officers or may sustain self-practice.
content.Infrastructure: Being an old college it doesn't have e a modern infrastructure but it has the old aesthetic vibes. A very huge campus, lush green grounds, and well-constructed roads. All essential labs and libraries also have a well-established associated LLR hospital with it.

faqs.answer: Getting admission into G.S.V.M. Medical College is very hard and challenging because it is a very well-established and renowned medical institution. In that respect, the difficulty level may change every year.
